title: Software / SaaS Content Technical Writer
description:
We focus on the B2B space in SEO. Like any SEO play, our success depends on the quality of content on our sites. Content could not be more central to the business.



We’re looking for contract/freelance blog writers for B2B websites. This is a perfect opportunity for folks who love to write, enjoy business topics and providing value to readers, and want complete flexibility with their work hours and workload.



> Your Responsibilities



Writing new posts that target SEO keywords.

Updating old posts to improve quality and keep them fresh for Google.

Optimizing content for click-through rates and revenue.

Giving feedback and recommendations on how to improve writing processes.



> How to Tell If You’ll be a Great Fit



This role will focus exclusively on B2B content like software buying decisions, how to create websites, marketing topics, etc. You should be excited by writing exclusively in this area.



You embrace the writing grind. There is an endless queue of new posts and updates that we need to ship.



You won’t dread writing about the same topic extensively. It’s critical that our sites focus on specific topics that generate revenue. That means writing about those topics exhaustively. Even after doing your 100th post update on creating an ecommerce site, you should still be able to get excited about ways to improve that content.





You know how to balance revenue and engagement. Yes, we want content that delights the reader. But we also need to maximize revenue while making Google happy. Finding the perfect balance between SEO rankings, reader engagement, and revenue should excite you.



You follow the data. While writing is highly subjective, you’re always willing to put ideas to the test, see how it impacts our traffic and revenue, then iterate as needed. When data shows that a particular direction isn’t working, you gladly toss it aside in order to try something else.



> Here’s what to expect:



2000+ word blog posts. You can choose to do only five posts per week or as many as you feel capable of.



Fully comfortable with using and publishing on WordPress, editing, creating featured images, taking screenshots etc..



Once your draft is finished, it will go through a light round of editing and then get published. We try to avoid any back-and-forth on posts if possible.



All the topics will be about business and include things like how to create websites, software/tool reviews, marketing, etc.



Must have bandwidth to write at least five posts per week.



100% remote, work from anywhere you like.



> How to Apply:



Apply on this website and include your resume, a cover letter/message, and links (or attachments) to 2-3 writing samples.



Samples should ideally be B2B or business-related posts, but this is not required. Please make sure you are comfortable committing to at least five posts per week before applying.



Also include any links you want us to see, such as published works on other sites or a blog.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000

title: Cold Caller for Web Design Agency (Outbound Sales)
description:
We're Savvy Sites Solutions, a US based web design agency that builds professional websites for small businesses across the country. We have thousands of verified phone numbers of small business owners (contractors, tradespeople, local service businesses) who either have no website or a poor one, and we need confident, friendly callers to reach out and book them for a quick consultation with our closer.

What you'll do:

Call small business owners in the US from our provided lead lists

Introduce our web design services in a warm, helpful way (not pushy)

Qualify interest by asking a few simple questions about their current website situation

Book interested prospects into our calendar for a follow up consultation

Log call outcomes in a simple Google Sheet (answered, no answer, not interested, booked, callback)

Hit a target of 80 to 120 dials per day

What we provide:

A lead list with name, business, and phone number (fully scrubbed and ready)

Training on our offer, pricing, and how to handle common questions

A Google Sheet tracker and clear daily targets

Who we're looking for:

Clear, neutral, easy to understand English (US clients must be comfortable on the call)

Prior cold calling, appointment setting, or outbound sales experience strongly preferred

Thick skin, positive attitude, and the ability to stay consistent through rejection

Reliable internet and a quiet calling environment

Available to call during US business hours (flexible on time zone, Eastern or Central preferred)

Compensation:

Base pay plus commission per booked appointment that shows up, plus a larger bonus on any deal that closes. We reward performers and scale hours up quickly for top callers.

How to apply:

Send a short voice recording (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself, describing your cold calling experience, and explaining why you'd be a good fit.

title: Sales Executive

title: Appointment Setter — Remote | US-Based Agency
description:
Note - 



Only applications submitted via the link below will be accepted. - 



About Us

We're a fast-growing US-based social media management and video editing agency helping businesses grow their online presence and convert attention into revenue. Our team is lean, results-driven, and scaling quickly — and we need a sharp appointment setter to help us fill our sales calendar with qualified business owners.



The Role

You will be the first voice prospects hear. Your job is simple but critical: reach out to business owners, qualify them, and book them onto a call with our closer. No closing required, just consistent, high-quality conversations that lead to booked appointments.



This is a high-activity, performance-based role. If you're disciplined, resilient on the phone, and motivated by commission, you'll earn well here.



What You'll Do

Make outbound calls to business owner leads daily

Follow up with leads via phone, DM, and
 until they book or disqualify

Qualify prospects based on our criteria before booking

Manage and update leads in our CRM accurately

Hit daily and weekly KPIs (calls made, conversations held, appointments set)

Show up consistently, track your numbers, and communicate with the team



You're a Fit If You

Have at least 6 months of outbound cold calling experience

Have called business owners or decision-makers before

Are fluent in English — clear, confident, and professional on the phone

Are available during US business hours (EST / CST / PST)

Have a quiet workspace, reliable internet, and a working headset

Are self-managed, coachable, and not afraid of rejection

Have experience with a CRM (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Close, or similar)



You're NOT a Fit If You

Have only done inbound support or chat-based sales

Expect a high base with low accountability

Go quiet when targets aren't hit instead of communicating

Need heavy hand-holding to stay on task



Pay Strucure : Base pay plus commission



Commission: 10% on every closed sale you set



Package Size Your Commission Per Close

$1,500/mo $150 per deal

$3,000/mo $300 per deal

$5,000/mo $500 per deal

Set 8–12 appointments per month with a solid show rate and you're looking at $1,200–$3,000+/month extra based purely on performance.

You require detailed step-by-step direction to execute

Overview



We are hiring a senior-level operator to take direction of infrastructure and platform scalability for a growing SaaS product.



This is a hands-on leadership role. You will design, build, and manage the system architecture while working directly with executive leadership.



You are expected to make high-level technical decisions independently and execute them.



What You Will Own

System Architecture

Design and scale a multi-tenant SaaS infrastructure

Build dynamic server provisioning (server spooling) systems

Implement auto-scaling, load balancing, and failover strategies

Ensure high availability and fault tolerance

Performance & Data Systems

Architect scalable database systems for multi-tenancy

Implement advanced caching strategies (Redis, etc.)

Optimize system performance under real-world load

Ensure tenant isolation and data integrity

DevOps & Infrastructure

Own CI/CD, deployments, and environment management

Build infrastructure using IaC principles

Manage cloud environments (AWS/GCP)

Implement monitoring, logging, and alerting systems

Engineering Contribution

Write backend code where necessary (Laravel/PHP or similar)

Build and maintain APIs supporting the platform

Strict Requirements

Experience in backend/DevOps roles

Direct experience scaling SaaS platforms (not just contributing)

Proven ability to design systems handling:

High concurrency

Horizontal scaling

Distributed workloads

Strong experience with:

Cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)

Containers (Docker, Kubernetes or equivalent)

Databases at scale (MySQL/Postgres)

Caching layers (Redis, Memcached)



What We Are NOT Looking For

Junior or mid-level developers

Candidates without production scaling experience

“Tutorial-level” DevOps knowledge

Designers or frontend-focused engineers



Engagement

Full-time (temporary ? permanent based on performance)

Hourly or fixed rate for Phase 1

Long-term role for future system expansion



Expectations

Daily progress reporting

Fluent written communication (mandatory)

Ability to operate independently without hand-holding

Participation in video interviews

Position Summary



This role is effectively:



Lead DevOps Engineer

Platform Architect



You will be expected to think and operate at high level for systems, while remaining hands-on in execution.

title: Persuasive Salesperson
description:
Sales Professionals Wanted: Join the AI Revolution with AI Suite 360



Are you a driven, high-energy sales professional looking to represent a product that practically sells itself? We are expanding our team and looking for top-tier talent to introduce businesses to AI Suite 360—the ultimate all-in-one artificial intelligence solution designed to save time, solve complex problems, and drive unprecedented growth.



The Opportunity



The business landscape is changing rapidly, and companies are actively seeking ways to integrate AI into their daily operations. AI Suite 360 is at the forefront of this transformation. Our comprehensive platform empowers businesses to automate workflows, enhance customer engagement, and unlock new levels of efficiency without the need for multiple disjointed tools.



As a Sales Representative for AI Suite 360, you will be the bridge between cutting-edge technology and the businesses that need it most. You will have the opportunity to engage with decision-makers, demonstrate the undeniable value of our platform, and close deals in a high-demand market.



What We Offer



We believe in rewarding performance and providing our team with the resources they need to succeed. When you join us, you can expect:



•

Uncapped Earning Potential: Your success directly translates to your income. With a highly competitive commission structure, the sky is the limit for motivated individuals.



•

A High-Demand Product: You will be selling a solution that businesses are actively looking for. AI Suite 360 solves real problems, making your job easier and more rewarding.



•

Comprehensive Training and Support: We provide you with all the knowledge and marketing materials you need to confidently present AI Suite 360. You will be fully equipped to handle objections and close sales.



•

Flexibility and Autonomy: We value results over micromanagement. You will have the freedom to manage your pipeline and build relationships in a way that works best for you.



Who We Are Looking For



We are seeking individuals who are passionate about technology and possess a relentless drive to succeed. The ideal candidate will have:



•

A proven track record in B2B sales, with a history of meeting or exceeding targets.



•

Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with the ability to articulate complex concepts in a clear, persuasive manner.



•

A high-energy, problem-solving mindset that thrives in a fast-paced environment.



•

The ability to build and maintain strong relationships with clients, ensuring long-term satisfaction and retention.



How to Apply



If you are ready to take your sales career to the next level and be part of a team that is shaping the future of business technology, we want to hear from you.



Please submit your resume and a brief introduction highlighting your sales experience and why you are the perfect fit for AI Suite 360. Join us in bringing the power of AI to businesses everywhere.

title: BI Developer & Analyst
description:
Job Overview:

We are a growing distributor based in USA, looking for a skilled BI Developer to build our business reporting system. This is a part-time, long-term role (10–20 hours per week) with opportunity to grow into more hours over time. We have two data sources we want to turn into dashboards:



Our ERP system — it has an existing API. We want to pull real-time data for KPIs across sales, customer service, inventory, and financial performance.

System
s — our business software sends several structured
s per day (order confirmations, quotes, transaction notifications) that contain data we want captured and reported on.



You will work directly with the senior managers to design the solution, build it, and improve it over time.



About the Work:

Your first projects will include:



Connecting to our ERP API and pulling the data we need into a reporting layer (Google Sheets, a database, or a tool you recommend)

Building
 parsing automations for our daily system notifications

Building dashboards in Google Looker Studio (or your recommended BI tool) for daily, weekly, and monthly review

Defining KPI frameworks for our CSR team, sales, inventory, and financials



We already have a detailed KPI build guide for our CSR team that gives you a clear starting point. From there we will expand together.



Responsibilities:



Integrate with our ERP's existing API to extract data on a scheduled basis

Build
 parsing automations for our daily system notifications

Design a clean data structure that's easy to maintain and expand

Build dashboards and reports in Google Looker Studio (or your preferred BI tool)

Define KPIs with clear calculation logic, targets, and documentation

Document everything so our team knows how metrics are calculated

Recommend tools and workflows — we are open to your expertise

Maintain and improve the system over time as our business grows

Meet weekly by video call to review progress and plan next priorities



Requirements:



3+ years of experience building business dashboards (please show examples)

Strong skills in Google Looker Studio, Power BI, or Tableau

Experience consuming REST APIs from business systems — ERP, CRM, e-commerce, or similar

 parsing automation experience using one or more of: Google Apps Script, Zapier, Make (Integromat), or Power Automate

Strong skills in Google Sheets AND at least one of: SQL, Python, or JavaScript

Experience defining KPIs from scratch, not just building charts someone else specified

Able to write clean English and communicate clearly in video calls

Reliable internet, quiet workspace for calls

Detail-oriented — will notice inconsistent data and ask questions rather than build on broken foundations

Available for at least a 30-minute overlap with US Eastern Time hours



Nice to Have:



Experience with HVAC, distribution, wholesale, or trades industry ERP systems

Experience with cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake)

Experience presenting dashboards to non-technical users

Comfortable debugging API authentication and rate-limit issues



How to Apply:

Please send your application with the following. Applications missing any of these will not be considered:



A link to your portfolio or 2–3 screenshots of dashboards you have built (anonymize sensitive data)

A short description of a project where you pulled data from a business system API (ERP, CRM, or similar) into a reporting system — which system, what data, what was the end result?

A short description of a project where you extracted data from
s into a reporting system

Which BI tools, automation tools, and programming languages you are strongest in, with years of experience for each

Your proposed monthly rate for 10–20 hours per week

Answer this question: "Walk me through how you would build a daily sales dashboard that pulls data from an ERP API every morning. What tools would you use, how would you handle authentication, and how would you make sure the data stays accurate?"

Start your message with the word "CURIOUS" so we know you read the full post



Compensation and benefits to be discussed based on experience and proposed rate.

We review every application that follows these instructions. We ignore applications that don't. Looking forward to meeting you.

title: Senior Financial Analyst
description:
Who is Bare?



Bare is one of Australia’s fastest growing businesses, in one of the most traditional industries in the world — the funeral industry.

We exist to make end-of-life care accessible, affordable and transparent, changing the way Australians deal with death. For too long, the industry has delivered expensive, traditional, cookie-cutter services that don’t reflect how modern Australians want to say goodbye.

By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalised and affordable. In just five years, we’ve supported more than 40,000 families, become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (recognised for customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and built a team of 100+ passionate people.

And we’re just getting started.

As part of our continued growth, we’re looking for a Senior Financial Analyst to join our finance team.



So, what’s the role?



This is not your typical Senior Financial Analyst role. You’ll work closely with our VP Finance and senior leadership team, helping to drive financial insight and discipline across one of Australia’s fastest growing companies.

You’ll play a key role in financial analysis, reporting, forecasting and business partnering, turning financial data into meaningful insights that support smart commercial decisions.

This is a hands-on role in a fast-paced, high-growth environment, ideal for someone who enjoys digging into the numbers, improving processes, and influencing business decisions.



You’ll be responsible for:



-Preparing monthly financial reports, dashboards and P&L analysis, including clear variance commentary

-Supporting the budgeting and forecasting processes across multiple entities

-Building and maintaining financial models to support planning and decision-making

-Providing financial insights and analysis to support senior leadership and operational teams

-Partnering with State Leads and department heads to monitor performance and improve margins

-Assisting with reconciliations and financial data accuracy across systems

-Supporting compliance with BAS, PAYGW, FBT and other regulatory requirements

-Assisting with audit preparation and working with external auditors

-Identifying opportunities to improve financial processes and reporting efficiency

-Supporting the implementation of automation, AI tools and improved reporting frameworks



What will set you apart from other candidates:



-You’re analytical and commercially minded, able to turn data into meaningful insights

-You enjoy solving problems and improving processes

-You’re comfortable working in fast-paced, high-growth environments

-You’re highly organised and able to manage multiple priorities

-You take ownership and initiative, proactively identifying opportunities for improvement

-You’re curious and interested in leveraging technology and automation in finance



What you’ll bring:



-A Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or a related field

-CPA, CA or CMA qualification (or working towards) highly regarded

-4–6+ years’ experience in financial analysis, reporting or accounting

-Strong experience with financial reporting, forecasting and variance analysis

-Advanced Excel / financial modelling skills

-Experience with Xero or similar accounting systems

-Strong communication skills and the ability to present financial insights clearly to non-finance stakeholders



What’s in it for you?



This isn’t your ordinary finance role, in your ordinary company. You’ll join an entrepreneurial, inclusive culture where we succeed together. We offer autonomy, flexibility and real ownership. No two days are the same — and that’s exactly how we like it.



In addition, we offer:



-Strong opportunities for career growth and progression

-A high-performing and highly engaged team environment

-Autonomy and flexibility, including work-from-home options

-A competitive remuneration package

-The opportunity to help transform an industry and make a real human impact



The main reason you’ll join, however, is because you believe in what we’re building. You’re excited by growth. You want to help scale a business that is genuinely changing lives — and you want your finance expertise to be part of that journey.



Please include your resume in your application. Thank you!

We’re looking for a highly empathetic and organized Customer Service Specialist to take full ownership of our customer experience across all e-commerce channels and brands. About Us:

Moe’s Group is a global leader in skincare manufacturing, trusted by over 100 international brands. We combine innovation, quality, and a personalized approach to help businesses scale and succeed in competitive markets. From manufacturing to brand strategy, our end-to-end services are designed to exceed expectations, backed by a team committed to customer satisfaction and long-term success. At Moe’s Group, we don’t just support brands—we empower them to lead.



What you’ll do:

-Act as the primary point of contact for all customer inquiries across multiple e-commerce platforms and brands 

-Monitor, respond to, and manage product reviews and seller feedback to maintain high brand ratings 

-Manage the end-to-end return and refund process, ensuring a seamless experience for the customer 

-Resolve customer issues, shipping delays, and product inquiries with speed, professionalism, and empathy 

-Identify recurring customer pain points and provide feedback to the product and operations teams 

-Maintain a high response rate and ensure all messages are addressed within 24 hours (including weekends as scheduled) 

-Keep accurate records of customer interactions and return reasons to assist in quality control 

-Collaborate with the logistics team to track shipments and resolve delivery discrepancies



What we’re looking for:

-3+ years of experience in E-commerce Customer Support (Amazon, Shopify, or Walmart experience required) 

-Expertise in handling marketplace communications and navigating "Account Health" related to customer service 

-Proven ability to handle difficult customers and turn negative experiences into positive reviews 

-Exceptional written English skills with a focus on brand-appropriate tone and etiquette 

-Highly organized and capable of managing high message volumes across multiple brands 

-Familiarity with helpdesk software (e.g., Gorgias, Zendesk) and marketplace messaging portals

-Self-starter mindset with the ability to build and document CS processes from the ground up 

-Experience in the skincare or beauty industry is a plus



Why join us?

-100% remote work opportunity 

-Long-term stable job with significant room for professional growth 

-Fixed weekends off -All necessary tools, courses, and subscriptions provided.



Learn more about our company by visiting our website:

title: Outbound Lead Generation & Partnerships Specialist (Results-Driven)
description:
We are building a global platform for the Pilates industry — connecting instructors, studios, brands, events, and job opportunities all in one place.



We are not looking for a typical Virtual Assistant.



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of outreach, partnerships, and lead generation, and drive real results.



This role is for someone who knows how to find the right people, start meaningful conversations, follow up effectively, and convert interest into confirmed partnerships.



You will not be given step-by-step instructions for everything. You are expected to think, improve, and take initiative.



What you’ll be responsible for:

- Sourcing high-quality leads (Pilates studios, instructors, retreat hosts, brands)

- Reaching out via Instagram,
, and other channels

- Managing conversations and following up consistently

- Converting leads into confirmed partners for our platform

- Tracking outreach and improving response and conversion rates

- Suggesting better messaging, systems, and outreach strategies



What we’re looking for:

- Proven experience in outreach, lead generation, or sales

- Strong written communication (clear, professional, and persuasive)

- Someone who takes initiative and does not wait to be told what to do

- Ability to think critically and improve processes

- Comfortable using Instagram as a primary outreach channel

- Highly organised and able to manage multiple conversations at once

- Results-driven mindset — you care about outcomes, not just completing tasks



This is NOT for you if:

- You need constant direction to complete tasks  

- You are only comfortable following instructions  

- You focus on activity (sending messages) instead of results (conversions)



Bonus if you have:

- Experience in wellness, fitness, or events

- Experience working with marketplaces or platforms

- Experience improving outreach systems or funnels



Working structure:

We are building something global and long-term. We are looking for someone who wants to take ownership and grow with us.



To apply:

title: Video Editer
description:
Video Editor (Short-Form Content)



We are a fast-growing Dutch e-commerce brand operating in the food and sustainability space, focused on creating high-performing short-form content across platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and paid social. Our content is built to capture attention fast and convert viewers into customers, and we are now looking for a Video Editor who can help us scale that output consistently.



In this role, you will be responsible for turning pre-written scripts into engaging, fast-paced videos. You won’t need to come up with concepts yourself, as we provide the structure, scripts, and direction. Your main focus will be execution: editing efficiently, following proven formats, and producing content at a high volume without sacrificing quality. This is not a slow, perfectionist editing role. It’s built for someone who understands speed, rhythm, and what makes content perform in today’s short-form environment.



You will be working primarily with CapCut for editing and ElevenLabs for generating voice-overs. We expect you to be comfortable with both tools, or at least have prior experience with similar software. On average, we expect around 3 to 4 videos per 2 hours, depending on the complexity of the content. Over time, you will get faster as you learn our style and workflow, and we will actively train you to improve your performance and output.



The position is fully remote and pays $10 per hour. There is flexibility in working hours, but we do expect a consistent commitment and the ability to deliver work on time. For the right person, this can turn into a long-term collaboration with increasing hours and responsibility as we scale.



We provide everything you need to succeed in this role, including scripts, clear instructions, and ongoing training. You will be working with a team that understands what works in performance marketing, and you’ll have the opportunity to improve your editing skills while working on content that actually drives results.



If you’re interested, send us examples of your previous short-form content, tell us how many videos you can realistically produce per day, and briefly explain your experience with CapCut and ElevenLabs. To make sure you’ve read everything carefully, include the word bread somewhere in your application.



We’re looking forward to working with someone who is fast, reliable, and ready to grow with us.

title: Video Editor + Admin VA
description:
We are a growing YouTube & Tiktok-based content business looking for one specific type of person: 



> Someone who is highly detail-oriented, follows systems precisely, and can edit talking head and faceless videos to a professional standard.



This is NOT a general VA role. Video editing is the core of this position — 90% of what you will do. If you cannot edit cleanly, follow a workflow exactly as shown, and QA (Quality Review) your own work before submission, this role is not for you.



?  Read carefully. This role requires a specific skill set and mindset. If you're the right fit, you'll know it immediately.

__________________________________



THE ROLE

You will edit talking head and faceless educational videos using CapCut desktop (paid/Pro version required). You will follow a specific workflow that has been developed and refined for this business. You will QA your own work during editing — not after — and submit clean videos that do not require correction.



You will also handle supporting admin tasks once video editing is mastered.

___________________________________



VIDEO EDITING - PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITY (85%)

This is the most important part of the role. Everything else is secondary.

•  Edit talking head and faceless videos in CapCut desktop (Pro version required)

•  Follow a precise 3-step workflow: cut audio ? sync video ? QA simultaneously during editing

•  Extract audio from video clips and manage audio/video tracks separately on the timeline

•  Remove mistakes, pauses, breaths, and dead air with clean, undetectable cuts

•  Ensure no words are cut off — every word must complete fully before a cut

•  Eliminate all screen jumps — mouse movement must be natural and continuous across every clip transition

•  Ensure all audio clips are directly adjacent on the timeline — no gaps

•  QA during editing, not after — you should know your video is clean before you submit it

•  Complete a full QA checklist before every submission

•  Target turnaround: 20-minute video edited and submitted within 4 hours

•  Add end screens, CTAs, captions, thumbnails, and descriptions for YouTube and TikTok

* Add graphics, text, pop-ups and motion graphics on video

___________________________________



ADMIN/OPERATIONS SUPPORT - SECONDARY RESPONSIBILITY (15%)



•  Social media research and engagement using provided SOPs

•  Community management (comments, conversation starters)

•  Manage tasks and deadlines in Asana and Slack

•  Update sales systems, lead information, and website content

•  Proofread and update documents and spreadsheets accurately

•  Daily and weekly reporting - research and data entry



________________________________



MUST HAVE

If you cannot meet all of the following, do not apply.

•  CapCut desktop — paid/Pro version — installed and ready before start date

•  Able to edit a 20-minute talking head video within 4 hours once trained

•  Available to work EST hours (evenings 6–9 PM EST for training for the first 2-3 weeks, daytime EST after training)

•  Follows workflows exactly as taught — no substituting your own methods

•  Takes detailed notes during training and does not ask repeated questions

•  Submits a completed QA checklist with every video — no exceptions

•  Does not submit work with obvious errors — you catch your own mistakes

________________________________



YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE

•  A background that required extreme attention to detail — QA/compliance, medical billing, insurance operations, paralegal, data auditing, finance, claims processing, or similar

•  Proven experience editing talking head or faceless YouTube videos

•  A structured, analytical mindset — you think critically when something looks or sounds wrong

•  Strong time management — you complete work on deadline without dragging hours

•  CapCut desktop experience (required) — Adobe Premiere or Final Cut Pro is a plus

•  Experience with Asana, Notion, ClickUp, or Slack

•  Canva experience for thumbnails and basic graphics



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

$3–5 USD/hour depending on experience and performance after training ($2.50 Per hour during training)

•  Paid weekly

•  13th-month pay

•  Monthly performance bonuses for exceeding KPIs

•  Annual retention bonus review

•  Performance-based raises

•  Promotion path — top performers can grow into team lead roles

•  Ongoing skill training (AI, social media, video editing, copywriting, and more)

•  Stable, long-term employment with clear systems, SOPs, and feedback

___________________________



HOW TO APPLY - READ EVERY STEP

Send an
 to 
 with the subject line:

"Applying To – Video Editor VA – [Your Name]"



Include ALL of the following in your
:



1. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

2. Resume (PDF)

3. A 1–2 minute intro video: tell us who you are, your editing experience, and what makes you the right fit for this specific role

4. A video editing sample — ideally a talking head or faceless video you have edited. No sample = no consideration.

5. Confirm you have CapCut desktop Pro installed and ready

6. Confirm you are available EST hours

7. Put the word EAGLE at the end of your
 so we know you read this in full



*Applications that do not follow these steps exactly will not be reviewed. Attention to detail starts with how you apply.

title: Senior Pilates Educator (Online) – Casual
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced Pilates professional to join our education team in a senior teaching and mentoring capacity, supporting the delivery of our Pilates training programs.



Pilates Movement Australasia is a Pilates education and training institute delivering structured certification programs through an online learning model. Students complete theoretical components via a learning portal, supported by guided practical application and one-on-one mentoring.



The role of a Pilates Educator (Online) is focused on delivering 1:1 mentoring sessions to support students through their learning progression, technique development, and assessment preparation.



This is a flexible, session-based casual role, where mentoring is allocated based on student enrolments. As students enrol into our programs, they are assigned a set number of mentoring sessions, which are conducted online.



Educators provide their availability in advance, and these time slots are made available for students to book. This allows for flexibility while maintaining a structured system for session delivery.



Hours are scalable, with the opportunity to increase as enrolments grow. Over time, this may develop into a more consistent schedule depending on demand and availability.



- The Role -

This position is suited to a senior educator with extensive practical experience who can contribute to high-level student development, mentoring, and quality assurance across the course.



The role requires access to a full range of studio apparatus to facilitate virtual sessions.





-Key Responsibilities-



- Deliver advanced virtual mentoring and education to Pilates students

- Support student progression in programming, teaching, and exercise modification

- Provide detailed, constructive feedback on practical teaching and technique

- Guide students in developing safe, effective, and professional teaching skills

-nContribute to maintaining high educational standards across the program

- Collaborate with the education team to ensure alignment with industry and professional guidelines



In addition, as the organisation continues to develop and seek accreditation with industry bodies, there may be occasional requirements to:



- Assist with documentation and administrative processes

- Support the preparation of evidence and materials required for accreditation submissions





-Initial Content Development-



As we continue to build and expand our training platform, there may be opportunities to contribute to content creation, including:



-Filming Pilates repertoire (Mat through to full studio apparatus)

-Demonstrating exercises for student learning

-Providing instructional guidance on how to teach movements

-Recording lecture sessions in line with the training guide





Educators may also have the opportunity to refer students into the program. Where a referral results in enrolment, a commission structure is in place, providing an additional income stream alongside mentoring sessions.





-Essential Requirements-



Comprehensive Pilates qualification (Mat, Reformer, and Studio Apparatus)

Minimum 4–5 years of full-time Pilates teaching experience



(approximately 10,000+ teaching hours)





Demonstrated experience in:



-Teaching diverse client populations (general and musculoskeletal conditions)

-Postural assessment (e.g. lordosis, kyphosis, forward head posture)

-Program design and exercise modification

-Strong communication skills with the ability to deliver clear instruction in English

-Access to a complete range of Pilates studio apparatus for online delivery





-Highly Regarded-



Experience in teacher training, mentoring, or supervising instructors

Experience with online teaching or virtual instruction





If this position is something you are looking for, please apply and attach your resume, outlining your qualifications in Pilates. If you require more information about the role, please feel free to

title: Customer Service Member
description:
Remote Customer Service Member (Work from Home)

Independent Contractor



A prominent and growing North American facilities services organization is expanding its remote operations support and is seeking dependable, detail-oriented customer support professionals. This is a work-from-home contractor engagement supporting commercial and retail clients across Canada.



This is an independent contractor engagement, paid weekly upon receipt of invoice. The schedule is 9-hour shifts, five (5) days per week. Occasional Saturday shifts (approximately once per month) may be required. Shifts align with Eastern Standard Time: 8:00–5:00, 9:00–6:00, or 10:00–7:00 EST.



Role Overview

This is a dynamic, high-energy administrative and customer support position where every day brings new experiences and opportunities for professional growth. The role involves real-time coordination via Zoom and other internal systems to progress various tasks.



As an independent contractor working with our Customer Service Team, you’ll play a key role in maintaining the efficient flow of work orders through our systems and processes. 



Based on your skills and interests, you’ll be assigned to one of our specialized sub-teams:



•
ing Team: Monitor and manage an inbox with thousands of daily incoming
s, sort and flag urgent or high-priority
s, and collaborate with relevant teams.

• Scheduling Team: Dispatch and schedule work orders with technicians to ensure timely completion.

• Compiling Team: Handle compiling tasks, including before/after photos, invoices, sign-offs, assisting with month-end closures, and answering phones.

• Check-In/Out Team: Sign in technicians as they arrive on-site for jobs, address any issues or scope changes, and ensure smooth operations while technicians are on location.



Each sub-team works collaboratively to deliver exceptional service while minimizing bottlenecks in our workflows.



Requirements for Home Office Set Up:

• Windows PC preferred, running Windows 11

• Minimum 300 Mbps internet speed; Fibre connection strongly preferred

• Multiple monitors required (single monitor setups not suitable)

• High-quality headset with a microphone and a Reliable webcam

• Quiet, professional workspace suitable for full-day Zoom collaboration

Traits We Are Seeking:

Organization: You can handle high
 volumes, prioritize tasks, and keep everything on track.

Problem-solving: You take initiative, think independently, and easily resolve issues.

Collaborative Communicator: You work confidently with others, fostering accountability and motivation. You are a positive, self-motivated individual with clear communication.

Composed Under Pressure: You enjoy working within tight deadlines and fast-paced environments. 

Proven work history: You are looking for a long-term opportunity and have a proven track record. Experience in virtual assistance, remote administrative roles, or customer service preferred.

Strong technical Skills: You have in-depth technical skills with the ability to work in several systems and databases at one time

title: MARKETING SPECIALIST
description:
Position Overview:



We are seeking a dynamic and skilled Marketing Specialist to help transform our marketing team into a highly efficient,

system-driven engine. This role will focus on connecting our products with real-world customer needs by modularizing them

into reusable building blocks, enabling customer self-selection through structured scenarios, cases, and demand collection

strategies.



As a Marketing Specialist, you will play a key role in reshaping Buck Sports from a “custom apparel supplier” to a

“decision-assist platform” that drives customer decisions and ensures long-term growth.



Responsibilities:



Develop and implement a system for modularizing products into reusable building blocks (e.g., fabric, craft, fit, MOQ,

lead-time tiers).

Design and manage a scenario system that helps structure customer needs based on real-world usage contexts.

Build and structure case studies that are reusable by both sales teams and our website, with clear decision logic and

outcomes.

Create and implement demand collection strategies that capture relevant customer data and map it to product modules,

scenarios, and cases.

Facilitate inter-department collaboration to ensure smooth integration of marketing systems across the organization.

Contribute to transforming Buck Sports into a “decision-assist platform” through innovative marketing systems.

Analyze data and provide insights for improving marketing campaigns and customer targeting, ensuring that decisions

are backed by robust reporting and analytics.

Manage social media platforms and create engaging content to promote products and engage customers.

Assist with website design and development, ensuring a seamless user experience and clear product presentation.

Create and execute
 marketing campaigns using Mailchimp to drive engagement and conversions.

Use Canva for designing and editing visual content for both digital and print materials.

Edit photos and videos for marketing materials and social media promotion.

Be knowledgeable with translation tools and ensure content is accurately localized for diverse audiences.

Create video content, including editing, as well as developing training materials to ensure proper usage of systems and

platforms across the organization.



Requirements:



Proven experience in system-driven marketing, with expertise in scenario planning or product modularization.

Strong background in data-driven marketing and customer self-selection strategies.

Background in reporting and analytics, with the ability to analyze and present actionable insights.

Expertise in social media management, with the ability to create engaging content across platforms.

Knowledge of website design, user experience, and the ability to assist in website management.

Experience using tools like Mailchimp for
 campaigns, Canva for graphic design/editing, and social media

platforms for promotion.

Proven experience in video and photo editing for marketing purposes.

Familiarity with translation tools and experience ensuring content is accurately localized.

Experience in catalog creation and management.

Ability to think structurally and strategically, beyond just creativity.

Excellent organizational skills with a keen attention to detail.

Capable of working independently with strong initiative and the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

Excellent collaboration skills to work cross-functionally with Product, Sales, and IT teams.



If you’re excited about transforming marketing into a strategic powerhouse and have the skills to drive customer decision

making, we would love to hear from you

title: Operations Manager
description:
About Us

Prime Path Advisory is a California-based tax advisory firm serving high-net-worth individuals, founders, and business owners across the United States. Our engagements start at $12,000 and cover advanced tax strategy, alternative investments, and financial planning. We're scaling rapidly and need an Operations Manager to bring process discipline, accountability, and structure to a growing team, so our founder can focus on strategy, and culture instead of putting out fires.



The Role

You'll own the operational backbone of the firm — building SOPs, enforcing workflows, processing payroll, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks across client delivery, sales, and admin. This is a hands-on leadership role reporting directly to the founder. You're not advising on process — you're building it, enforcing it, stepping in to coach when things go sideways, and holding people accountable. We have the tools (
, TaxDome, GoHighLevel, Notion, DocuSign); we need someone who makes the team actually use them correctly and consistently.



What You'll Own



Process Design & SOP Creation 

* Audit existing workflows across client delivery, sales, onboarding, and admin

* Write clear, step-by-step SOPs for every recurring process

* Standardize how the team uses 
, TaxDome, GHL, and Notion - eliminate ad-hoc workarounds

* Maintain a living SOP library that new hires can follow from day one



Accountability, Feedback & Team Leadership

* Own the 
 boards: ensure every client, task, and deadline is tracked accurately

* Run daily/weekly check-ins to catch missed deadlines, incomplete updates, and process violations before they become client issues

* Provide direct feedback and coaching to tea
mbers when work doesn't meet standards - you're the person who steps in, course-corrects, and follows up to make sure it sticks

* Flag breakdowns in real time and escalate to the founder only when necessary

* Track KPIs across departments (client delivery timelines, sales pipeline accuracy, response times)



Client Communication Support

* Step in and respond to clients when departments need backup — whether it's a delivery delay, a billing question, or an escalation that needs immediate attention

* Ensure the client journey runs smoothly from signed engagement to filed return

* Coordinate between tax advisors, the admin team, and the founder on escalations

* Monitor client communication channels (TaxDome,
) for consistency and timeliness



Payroll & Finance Operations

* Process payroll for the team — track pay periods, verify hours/commissions, and ensure timely payments

* Maintain and audit compensation records (base pay, commissions, contractor payments)

* Coordinate with the founder on payroll questions and discrepancies



Team Coordination & Onboarding

* Onboard new tea
mbers with structured checklists and tool access

* Serve as the central point of coordination between sales, advisory, admin, and marketing

* Support the founder in enforcing company standards without requiring his daily involvement.





Requirements

* 3+ years in operations, project management, or chief of staff roles — preferably at a professional services firm (accounting, legal, consulting, or financial advisory)

* Strong preference for candidates with experience at Athena, Wing, Belay, or similar high-standards operations firms

* Proven track record of building SOPs from scratch and getting teams to follow them

* Deep proficiency with project management tools — 
 experience strongly preferred

* Experience managing or processing payroll (contractor and/or employee)

* Strong written communication — you'll write SOPs, process docs, client responses, and team updates daily

* Experience holding people accountable without micromanaging — firm but collaborative

* Comfortable working asynchronously with a US-based team across multiple time zones

* Detail-obsessed — you catch the things everyone else misses

* Self-directed — you identify what's broken and fix it without being told



Preferred

* Background at a company with a structured, high-accountability operations culture (e.g., Athena, a Big Four firm, or a scaled professional services company)

* Prior experience in a tax, accounting, or financial advisory environment



How to Apply: Send your resume, portfolio and a short 1-minute video recording introducing yourself and explaining why you’d be a great fit for this role to: 



Important: In the subject line of your
, you must include: Operations Manager (X years of experience managing remote teams)



Applications that do not follow this subject line format will be automatically disqualified.

title: Product Manager — Mobile Apps
description:
AI Studio 10 is a mobile app studio building AI-native consumer products. We ship fast, we test aggressively, and we live or die by retention curves and LTV. Our flagship is Bible & AI Chat, and there's more coming.We're hiring a Product Manager who has actually built and scaled great mobile apps — not managed roadmaps from a distance, not written specs for enterprise software, but shipped consumer apps that real people loved and paid for. If you've been in the subscription app trenches and you have the metrics to prove it, this is for you.What you'll ownYou'll own the product end-to-end for one or more apps in the portfolio — from the data that tells us what's working, to the experiments that push conversion and retention up, to the roadmap that d
 what we build next.Specifically:– Analysis first, opinions second. Living inside our analytics stack (Amplitude, Mixpanel, RevenueCat, AppsFlyer) and turning behaviour into hypotheses. Funnels, cohorts, retention curves, LTV models — you read these like a native language.

– Owning the experimentation roadmap: onboarding, paywall, pricing, activation, retention loops. You prioritise what to test, run it properly, and kill or scale based on the read.

– Competitor and category research — teardowns of top-grossing apps in our categories, tracking paywall and onboarding changes, spotting patterns before they become obvious

– Writing clean specs and working directly with designers and engineers to ship — fast cycles, weekly releases, no ceremony

– Owning the metrics that matter: D1/D7/D30 retention, trial-to-paid, LTV, payback, churn. You set the targets and you're accountable to them.

– Working closely with UA and marketing — because in mobile, product and growth aren't separate functionsWhat we're looking for– 3+ years as a PM on consumer mobile apps, ideally subscription-based

– A portfolio of apps you've meaningfully shipped — tell us the name, the role, the metric that moved. Generic "drove engagement" doesn't cut it; we want "took D7 from 18% to 27% via onboarding rework."

– Deep fluency with mobile analytics: Amplitude, Mixpanel, RevenueCat, AppsFlyer, Adapty or Superwall

– Strong product instincts on the consumer side — you have opinions on onboarding flows, paywall UX, and why some apps retain while others don't

– Comfortable running experiments properly — sample sizes, significance, clean reads, not vibes

– You've done the competitor teardown thing before because you enjoy it, not because someone asked

– Strong written communication, async-friendly, high agencyBonus points– Experience in AI consumer apps, faith/wellness/self-improvement, or other subscription categories we care about

– Have built an app of your own (side project, indie, or studio work)

– Design sensibility — you can critique a Figma file and move it forward

– Comfortable with SQL or light data work for custom analysis

– Familiar with ASO, paywall tooling, and the full mobile growth stack

title: Content Strategist
description:
About Us

Prime Path Advisory is a California-based tax advisory firm serving high-net-worth individuals, founders, and business owners across the United States. Our engagements start at $12,000 and cover advanced tax strategy, alternative investments, and financial planning. We're building a content-driven brand to establish authority in our market and generate qualified inbound leads — and we need a senior content strategist to own that effort end-to-end.



The Role

You'll own our entire content ecosystem — YouTube, short-form social, paid advertising, and
. This is a strategy-plus-execution role reporting directly to the founder. You'll translate complex US tax and financial concepts into content that educates our audience, builds trust, and converts viewers into clients. You don't need to be a CPA, but you need to be able to write confidently about topics like S-corp elections, cost segregation, tax deferral strategies, and wealth planning without hand-holding.



What You'll Own

1. YouTube (Long-Form) Develop the channel content strategy and 90-day editorial calendar. Research and script video concepts around US tax strategy and HNW financial planning. Write full scripts optimized for retention and watch-time. Write SEO-optimized titles, descriptions, and chapter markers. Analyze performance data and iterate based on CPM, CTR, and audience retention.

2. Short-Form (TikTok / Reels / Shorts) Ideate and script short-form content (30–90 seconds), both repurposed from long-form and created natively. Build systems for high-volume output (10–20 pieces/week). Write platform-native hooks, captions, and CTAs. Stay ahead of trending formats in the finance and business content space.

3. Paid Advertising (Meta / Google) Write ad copy for Meta and Google campaigns targeting high-net-worth audiences. Develop VSL scripts and direct-response ad concepts. Write and A/B test landing page copy tied to campaigns. Ensure messaging consistency across ads, landing pages, and follow-up sequences.

4.
 & Newsletter Write a weekly
 newsletter to nurture leads and existing clients. Build automated sequences tied to lead magnets and content opt-ins. Repurpose video content into
-native formats. Maintain brand voice consistency across all written communications.



Requirements

* 3+ years of content strategy experience in financial services, fintech, or professional advisory — portfolio required

* Proven ability to write authoritatively on complex US financial or tax topics for a non-expert audience

* Experience contributing to or managing a YouTube channel at meaningful scale (10K+ subscribers or equivalent)

* Hands-on experience writing paid ad copy for Meta and/or Google — not just organic content

* Strong, independent command of written English — polished, publication-ready copy without heavy editing

* Proficiency with analytics tools: YouTube Studio, Meta Ads Manager, Google Analytics, and/or
 dashboards

* Working knowledge of SEO fundamentals and keyword research tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar)

* Self-directed and comfortable working asynchronously with a US-based founder





Preferred

* Prior experience creating content specifically about US tax strategy, S-corps, real estate investing, or HNW financial planning

* Familiarity with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar CRM/marketing automation platforms

* Background writing VSLs, webinar scripts, or direct-response long-form content





How to Apply: Send your resume, portfolio and a short 1-minute video recording introducing yourself and explaining why you’d be a great fit for this role to: 



Important: In the subject line of your
, you must include: Marketer (X years of managing a YouTube channel experience)



Applications that do not follow this subject line format will be automatically disqualified.

Answer customer phone calls using a softphone application on a computer.

Respond to customer
s and chats in a timely and professional manner.

title: Customer Support & Administrative Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant (Fast-Paced Admin + Customer Support) – Nights + Saturdays



We run a lawn care and landscaping company in Northern Virginia. We’re growing fast and need someone who can keep things organized, respond fast, and not let anything fall through the cracks.



This is not a slow or easy role.

We move fast and expect the same from you.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily)



* Responding to
s and text messages (fast & accurately— this is a big one)

*Making estimate followup calls 

*Creating SOP's and Systems

*Making sure every lead is tracked correctly in our system

* Moving jobs forward daily (nothing gets stuck)

* Tagging and cleaning up data in our CRM

* Posting on our Google Business profile

* Responding to Google reviews

* Helping keep Google Drive organized

* Light marketing support (social posts, basic updates)

* Ordering random things when needed (business cards, flyers, etc.)





Schedule 



* Must work Saturdays

* Must be available up to 10:00 PM EST

* This will likely be a split shift (morning + evening coverage)



What I Care About



* You respond FAST

* You are organized

* You don’t need to be chased

* You follow through

* You are very tech-savvy and can figure things out without being told every step



I don’t want to wonder if something got done.



Tech-Savvy (Very Important)



You need to be very comfortable with technology.



This means:



* You can learn new software quickly without step-by-step instructions

* You’ve worked with CRMs, dashboards, or automation tools

* You can set things up (not just click buttons)

* You can troubleshoot issues and figure things out on your own



We use tools like:



* Service Autopilot (CRM)

* GoHighLevel

* Google Drive

* Marketing and messaging platforms



 If you need constant help with tech, this is not the right role.



 **Requirements**



* Strong written English

* Extremely organized and detail-oriented

* Fast responder (non-negotiable)

* Tech-savvy

* Reliable internet

* Able to work evenings + Saturdays

*Ability to figure things out



Bonus (Not Required)



* Knowledge of Lawn Care or Home Service Industry

*Experience with CRMs (Service Autopilot, GoHighLevel, etc.)

* Canva or basic design

* Social media posting



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Send a message with:



1. A quick intro (keep it short)

2. What tools you’ve used (CRMs, etc.)

3. Your internet speed

4. Your favorite productivity tool

5. Tell me about a time you had to figure out a new tool or system on your own

6. Put the word **“READY”** at the top



If you don’t follow these steps, I won’t respond.



You must be fluent in English with little to no accent.  Please submit a few vocal recordings of you speaking.

You must have a computer with dual monitors, a webcam, and fast internet.  Please submit a picture of your set up and internet speed.

We will do 2 interviews and the second one is a “project”.  The way you complete and follow the directions of the project will be the main determining factor on who we hire.



Final Note



This role is for someone who:



* Moves fast

* Takes ownership

* Figures things out

* Keeps things organized



If that’s you, you’ll do very well here.

title: Sales & Lead Generation (Construction & Commercial Real Estate)
description:
About Us



Smith & Son Construction is a California-based general contractor specializing in commercial construction, tenant improvements, remodels, concrete/foundation work, and ongoing maintenance services. We work with property managers, HOAs, multifamily operators, and commercial clients across Northern California within a 250-mile radius of our Antioch headquarters.

We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Sales Virtual Assistant who can build and manage a strong pipeline of qualified opportunities — not just gather data, but generate real conversations and warm handoffs that our leadership team can act on.





Why This Role Is Different



You won’t be figuring this out from scratch. We’ve built a complete sales operations playbook that includes a researched master list of 58+ directories and portals, segment-specific outreach scripts, CRM field standards, a structured 90-day ramp plan with manager checkpoints, and clear KPI targets. You’ll have a system to execute from Day 1 — your job is to run it well and improve it over time.





Role Overview



Your primary responsibility is to identify, contact, and qualify potential clients and referral partners across Northern California. This means:

• Research and identify target accounts (property managers, HOAs, multifamily operators, commercial clients, architects/engineers, public agencies, and more)

• Find and verify decision-makers — the actual people who approve vendors, award bids, or greenlight projects

• Conduct outreach via
, phone, LinkedIn, and vendor registration portals

• Qualify leads by understanding their projects, needs, vendor processes, and timelines

• Manage and update the pipeline using GoHighLevel CRM with complete, accurate records

• Track all activities, conversations, and next steps — no lead enters the system without a source, segment, decision-maker title, and next action

• Surface bid opportunities from public procurement portals and construction lead platforms

• Coordinate clean handoffs of qualified opportunities to internal leadership with full context





Required Qualifications



• 2–3+ years of outbound sales experience in construction, commercial real estate, or property services (REQUIRED — marketing-only experience does not qualify)

• Proven track record in lead generation, cold calling, and qualifying decision-makers

• Strong CRM pipeline management experience (GoHighLevel preferred; HubSpot, Pipedrive, or Salesforce experience also accepted)

• Strong English communication skills — written and verbal — with confidence speaking to property managers, facilities directors, and executives

• Highly organized and detail-oriented with clean data habits

• Comfortable working independently, managing your own time blocks, and hitting weekly targets

Applicants without direct outbound sales experience in construction or real estate will be automatically disqualified.







Technical Requirements



• Reliable computer/laptop with high-quality headset

• Stable high-speed internet with backup connection (required)

• Quiet, professional work environment suitable for client-facing calls





Compensation



• Competitive hourly rate based on experience

• Monthly performance bonus tied to qualified handoff targets

• Structured onboarding with a 90-day ramp plan, scripts, and weekly check-ins

• Long-term growth opportunity as our pipeline and team scale





How to Apply?



Send your application to: 







Your application must include:



1. Your CV/Resume

2. A 2-minute Vocaroo recording introducing yourself — cover your experience, background, and why you’re a fit for this specific role

3. A short written summary of your construction or real estate outbound sales experience (not marketing)

4. Your CRM experience — which platforms, how you used them, and your approach to pipeline management

5. Confirmation that you can work Pacific Time hours and meet all technical requirements

Applications without a Vocaroo recording will not be considered.

title: Lead Manager - Real Estate Acquisitions (Warm Inbound Leads)
description:
Location: Remote

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 5 PM US Central Time

Compensation: $866/month ($5/hr), paid weekly via Wise or PayPal

Start Date: Monday, April 28th



---



ABOUT US



We're a real estate wholesaling company operating nationwide across the US that buys houses directly from motivated sellers. We run targeted marketing campaigns and need someone to manage the inbound leads those campaigns generate.



This is NOT a cold calling role. You'll be calling people who already responded to our marketing saying they want to sell. Your job is to qualify them, document everything properly, and move deals forward.



---



YOUR ROLE



You're the bridge between our marketing and our closings. When a seller texts back saying "yes, I'm interested," you take over.



You'll call them, ask the right questions, figure out if they're serious, document everything in our CRM, and hand qualified leads to the owner for offers.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Call 60-100 warm inbound leads per week (people who already responded to our SMS campaigns)

- Qualify each seller by gathering 4 critical data points: Property Condition, Timeline to Sell, Motivation, and Price Expectation

- Document every conversation in GoHighLevel CRM following our written SOP

- Manage follow-up schedules for leads not ready to sell immediately

- Hand fully-qualified sellers to the owner for underwriting and offers

- Goal: Deliver 5-10 qualified leads per week ready for offers



---



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING DAY-TO-DAY



Morning: Review your pipeline, call leads from yesterday who didn't answer, follow up on callbacks

Midday: Work through new inbound leads, make qualification calls, update CRM

Afternoon: Schedule follow-ups, document notes, prep tomorrow's call list, report to owner



You manage your own time. We don't micromanage call-by-call. We track results: calls made, leads qualified, pipeline movement, CRM accuracy.



---



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



REQUIRED:

? 6+ months of real estate experience (wholesaling, ISA, disposition, acquisitions, property management, real estate sales, or lead management for investors/agents)

? 6+ months of phone-based work (qualifying leads, appointment setting, sales calls, or customer service in real estate context)

? Strong conversational English (you'll be calling US homeowners — accent is fine, clarity matters)

? Comfortable making 60-100 calls per week independently without supervision

? Self-motivated and disciplined — you manage your schedule, hit your numbers, follow SOPs without reminders

? Available to work 9 AM - 5 PM US Central Time

? Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace for calls



STRONGLY PREFERRED:

? Experience with CRM systems like GoHighLevel, Podio, REsimpli, Salesforce, or similar

? Familiarity with US real estate investor terminology (ARV, equity, repair estimates, motivated seller psychology, closing timelines)

? Previous work with US-based real estate companies or investors



---



THIS ROLE IS NOT A FIT IF YOU:



? Need constant supervision or struggle following written instructions independently

? Expect to make fewer than 50 calls per week

? Want a closing/sales role (the owner handles all offers — you qualify and hand off)

? Can't commit to consistent 9 AM - 5 PM US Central Time hours



---



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Complete training during week 1 on our 4-pillar qualification system

- Detailed SOPs covering every scenario: no-answers, objections, follow-ups, pipeline handoffs

- Warm inbound leads only (no door-knocking, no cold prospecting strangers)

- Weekly payment every Friday via Wise or PayPal

- Clear performance metrics and regular feedback

- Growth opportunity as the business scales



---



COMPENSATION & PAYMENT



Pay: $866/month ($5/hour) for 40 hours per week

Payment Schedule: Weekly every Friday via Wise or PayPal

Start Date: Monday, April 28th



---



HOW TO APPLY



Submit the following (applications missing any component will not be reviewed):



1) VOICE RECORDING (60-90 seconds, in English):



Record yourself answering these 3 questions:

- How long have you been doing phone-based work, and what type of work was it?

- Scenario: You call a seller who says "Yeah, I'm interested in selling, but I don't know what my house is worth." What do you say next?

- Why do you want to work in real estate wholesaling specifically?



(You can use Loom, 
, or attach an audio file)



2) SHORT WRITTEN ANSWERS (3-5 sentences each):



- What CRM systems or lead management tools have you used before?

- Have you worked with US-based clients or companies before? If yes, describe the role.

- What's your availability to start?



3) RESUME



---



We're reviewing applications as they come in and scheduling interviews immediately. Strong candidates will hear back within 24 hours.



If you're someone who can work independently, handle conversations professionally, and execute systems without hand-holding, we want to talk to you.

title: Telemarketing for Medical Practice
description:
About This Job:

OptiMindHealth is a mental health and wellness counseling company. We are a group of doctors, psychologists, and clinical social workers committed to improving the psychological health and wellbeing of our patients. We are supported by a hard-working and devoted staff who help us in all aspects of practice operations. We are looking for an energetic, articulate, and highly driven telemarketer who can represent our company to current and potential clients and referral partners. This role blends high volume outbound calling, virtual community outreach, and service promotion, all done from a remote environment.



This position is an excellent opportunity for candidates with experience in BPO, outbound calling, sales, appointment setting, practice liaison/healthcare B2B engagement, or executive recruitment who are looking to advance their career in a meaningful and mission driven environment. We are seeking individuals with excellent English communication skills with a clear, professional, and confident speaking voice, who can represent our practice with warmth and credibility. A Bachelor’s degree in Communications or a related field is preferred and will help you excel in this role.



Healthcare experience is a plus, but not required. We invest in our team by providing comprehensive training, ongoing support, and the tools needed to succeed. If you are proactive, motivated, and passionate about educating and connecting with people, this role offers a rewarding opportunity to grow professionally while making a positive impact on our patients and community referral partners.



Key Responsibilities:

- Promote the company’s services to prospective and established clients.

- Develop relationships to promote our services to referral sources.

- Engage and qualify prospects through insightful, sales-focused conversations.

- Maintain strong relationships with organizations, schools, healthcare providers, and other established referral sources.

- Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of sales activities and make recommendations for improvement.

- Act as a liaison between the practice and the community by being a practice service line knowledge bearer.

- Maintain practice CRM, tracking contacts and incoming referral activity.

- Collaborate with our Management Team to ensure consistent messaging and branding in outbound sales efforts.



Salary and Work Setup:

The position is a permanent work from home arrangement, with additional details below.



1. Base Salary: 45,000 PHP Monthly

2. Commission-Based: No

3. Payment Method: Twice Per Month

4. Work Schedule: US Business Hours; Full-Time; 40 hours per week (No part-time)



Benefits Package:

Working at OptiMindHealth provides a stable work environment for staff members who excel and grow in their careers. Our benefits package includes:



1. Government-mandated benefits (SSS, Pag-Ibig, PHIC)

2. 13th Month Pay

3. HMO Coverage

4. Ten days of vacation per year

5. Five days of sick leave allowed per year

6. Philippine holidays observed



Include the following 2 items in your application to be considered for interview: An up-to-date CV, and a link to your sample voice recording. Your recording should be in your natural speaking voice and be at least 30 seconds in length. We require our staff to have an upbeat, positive, clear communication style and to have the ability to work closely and respectfully with a culturally diverse team.
