title: High-level Video Editor & Graphic Designer (Adobe Suite)
description:
Overview

We’re a boutique-style  marketing agency producing high-impact content for businesses across multiple industries. From fast-paced social media videos to polished corporate pieces, our work blends strategy with strong visual execution.



We’re looking for a high-level Video Editor & Graphic Designer to join our team.



This is not an entry-level role.



We are only considering applicants with 5+ years of professional experience in both video editing and graphic design, who can contribute creatively, think independently, and elevate the final product without constant direction.



Role Details:

Part-time OR full-time



What You’ll Be Working On



Video Editing:

Short-form social media content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

Longer-form corporate videos (3–10 minutes)

Story-driven edits that balance pacing, clarity, and engagement



Graphic Design:

Social media assets

Flyers and brochures

Supporting visual elements for video projects



Core Responsibilities:

Edit videos with strong pacing, storytelling, and attention to detail

Apply professional color grading and sound editing

Design clean, modern, and brand-aligned graphics

Stay current with social media trends and editing styles

Contribute creative ideas and improvements to projects

Work efficiently in a remote environment with clear communication



Requirements

5+ years of professional experience in video editing AND graphic design

Fluent in English (written and spoken)

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

Strong understanding of social media content performance

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines consistently



What Sets You Apart:

You don’t just edit… you think like a creator

You understand what keeps viewers watching

You can take direction but also lead creatively when needed

You are proactive and bring ideas, not just execution

You care about the final product, not just completing tasks

You're a strong communicator  (remote work depends on it)

Organized workflow and file management

Ability to receive and implement feedback quickly

Attention to detail and consistency in quality across different types of projects



Bonus Skills (Highly Valued)

Photo editing and color work in Adobe Lightroom

Motion graphics and animation (After Effects)

Experience with content creation and creative direction

Understanding of branding and visual identity systems

Basic knowledge of marketing and audience psychology



Important:

This role is not for beginners or those still learning the fundamentals.



We are looking for someone who can contribute at a high level from day one, bring ideas to the table, and grow with the company over time.



To Apply, please include:

Portfolio with both video and design work

title: Guest Experience & Review Conversion Specialist
description:
HIRING: Guest Experience & Review Conversion Specialist

Full-Time | Long-Term | Remote



IMPORTANT: Real STR / Airbnb experience is required.

Please do not apply if you do not have hands-on short-term rental experience.



We are hiring a high-level Guest Experience & Review Conversion Specialist for our growing short-term rental company based in Las Vegas.



This is not a regular VA role, and it is not just a messaging role.



We are looking for someone who can be the voice of Golden Home Stays.



The right person for this role is:



- warm and sweet with happy guests

- strategic and persuasive with upset guests

- excellent on the phone

- highly understandable in English

- calm under pressure

- proactive and smart

- emotionally intelligent

- strong at protecting reviews and recovering sentiment

- still operationally useful in the background



This role is responsible for much more than replying to messages. Your job is to protect the guest experience, recover negative sentiment before checkout, convert happy and neutral guests into 5-star reviews, and make sure no guest issue is ignored, delayed, or mishandled.



Main responsibilities



- HostBuddy inbox control

- Negative sentiment recovery

- Neutral sentiment conversion

- Daily guest health checks

- Guest request follow-through

- Post-checkout calls and review conversion

- Review protection and removal

- HostBuddy accuracy control

- Open issues and action items follow-through

- Clean escalation and task creation

- Basic operational/admin support in the background when needed



What matters most to us



- Real STR / Airbnb experience

- Strong spoken English

- Very easy to understand on calls

- Warm, polished, guest-friendly communication

- Strong phone confidence

- Emotional intelligence

- Strategic recovery skills

- Strong negotiation ability

- Calm under pressure

- Fast thinking

- Ability to guide conversations and outcomes

- Ability to work independently without being chased



- This role is not the right fit for someone who is:



- strong only in admin but weak on the phone

- strong only in customer service but weak in strategy

- robotic

- overly transactional

- hard to understand

- too passive

- unable to handle pressure

- unable to recover guest sentiment

- waiting to be told what to do all day



Schedule

- 5 days a week x 10 hours shifts = 200 hours a month



Pay

- Start at $5 per hour + Performance based Bonus structure 

- Hourly rate increase after 1 year



To apply

Please complete our application form here:





IMPORTANT:

We will require short audio/video recordings as part of the application process. We care much more about real communication, real thinking, and real guest-handling ability than polished written answers.

title: Sales Appointment Setter
description:
The Role

We are looking for a high-energy, articulate, and organized Appointment Setter to join our team. Your primary mission is to be the "voice" of our company—contacting leads, qualifying contractors, and booking discovery calls for our owner.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Calling: Follow up with leads and reach out to prospective landscape contractors.



Qualification: Use our specific criteria to ensure we only book meetings with high-revenue firms 



Appointment Setting: Manage the owner’s calendar and book meetings directly into our CRM (GoHighLevel).



Lead Management: Consistent follow-up with "warm" leads who haven't booked yet.



Relationship Building: Maintain a professional and consultative tone—you aren't just selling; you are a design consultant.



Requirements (Must-Haves)

Elite English Proficiency: You must have an excellent command of the English language with a neutral or North American accent. Clear, confident communication is non-negotiable.



Phone Experience: Proven track record in outbound sales, telemarketing, or appointment setting (preferably for the US/Canadian market).



Tech Savvy: Familiarity with CRMs (GoHighLevel experience is a massive plus) and Google Workspace.



Work Ethic: Ability to work US business hours (Eastern/Central Time).



Bonus Points If...

You have experience in the Landscaping, Construction  industries.



You understand the difference between "softscapes" and "hardscapes."



You have experience using GoHighLevel.



Why Join Us?

Competitive base salary plus performance-based bonuses/commission for every booked meeting that shows up and sold project.



Long-term stability in a growing, high-end industry.



Work with a modern design team using the latest 3D technology.

title: Landscape Designer
description:
I own a U.S.-based landscape design company that works with landscape contractors to create high-quality 3D renderings and 2D site plans, primarily for high-end residential homes. Due to increasing demand, I am looking for a skilled and reliable remote landscape designer to join me long-term. 

The role involves creating detailed 3D renderings and accurate 2D build-ready plans based on provided measurements, photos, and design notes. Most projects take between 5–40 hours to complete, and I need someone who can consistently deliver finished designs within 4 days or less. Applicants must have experience using Structure Studios (VIP 3D), any other 3d software, and AutoCAD. The ideal candidate has residential landscape design experience, strong attention to detail, the ability to follow direction and revisions carefully, good English communication skills, and the ability to work independently while meeting deadlines. Please apply with your portfolio (especially residential projects), a summary of your experience with the required software, and your typical turnaround time for a full project.

title: Python Developer
description:
We are Solid GPS. We’re a remote team that values efficiency, high-level logic, and, most importantly, world-class communication. We don’t care if you use AI to write your code; in fact, we expect it. What we care about is that you understand the code you produce, can troubleshoot it instantly, and can communicate progress with absolute clarity.



The Role

Type: Full Time (40 hours/week).



Pay: $1,280 USD / Month ($8/hr).



Hours: Flexible, but we operate in AEST (UTC +10). You must be available for a few hours of overlap for sync-ups.



Core Tech: Python, Github. (WordPress experience is a bonus).



What We’re Actually Looking For

- Proactive Communication: You don't wait for us to ask for an update. You provide clear, concise daily summaries of what was done, what’s blocked, and what’s next.



- AI-Literacy: You know how to prompt for clean, documented, and efficient code.



- Ownership: If a script breaks, you don't just say "it's broken." You tell us why it broke and how you're fixing it.



- English Mastery: Your written English must be professional, nuanced, and easy to understand.



How to Apply

Warning: Generic "copy-paste" applications will be ignored. To be considered, please provide:



1. Your Intro

Tell us about yourself in 100 words or less. Specifically, tell us how you use AI in your current workflow to stay efficient. Include your resume.



2. Loom Video

- Record a 2-minute maximum Loom video.

- Briefly introduce yourself.

- Explain one complex technical challenge you solved recently.



We are looking for verbal clarity, confidence, and your ability to explain complex ideas simply.



3. The Technical Challenge

We want to see how you think. Complete the task below and host it on a Public GitHub Repository.



Task: 



Submission: Paste the GitHub link and the Loom link in your message.

title: AI Content Creator (Veo 3 + CapCut) — Dog & Wellness Reels
description:
Looking for a full-time CapCut editor for short-form dog & wellness content (Instagram Reels, TikTok,
).



You will be given hooks (the on-screen text + script) and you'll be responsible for:

1. Generating the AI video clips in Google Veo 3

2. Generating supporting AI images in Nanobanana Pro

3. Editing everything together in CapCut — adding hook overlays, cutting for pacing, exporting 9:16 vertical



The style is text-on-screen driven: bold hook overlays, tight cuts, emotional payoff, 9:16 vertical. You'll follow a consistent template we'll train you on.



Previous CapCut experience is required. AI generation experience (Veo 3, Nanobanana, or similar AI image/video tools) is strongly favored — if you've already prompted AI tools for content, you'll ramp up much faster. We'll still train you extensively on our specific workflow, but candidates with AI generation experience will be prioritized.



You must also be proficient with ChatGPT and/or Claude — you'll use them daily to refine prompts, troubleshoot generations, and iterate on creative direction. This isn't optional; LLMs are core to the workflow.



Big plus if you own a dog — you'll be editing dog content daily, and dog owners naturally understand the emotional angles we work with (health concerns, senior dog worries, training struggles). It shows in the final edits.



Requirements:

- Attention to detail (text overlay timing matters — one frame off kills the hook)

- STRONG English (you'll be writing AI prompts from our hooks)

- Strong internet connection (heavy video downloads/uploads)

- iPhone preferred (for previewing edits on the device our audience uses)

- Previous experience with CapCut / TikTok / Instagram Reels

- Proficient with ChatGPT and/or Claude (REQUIRED — used daily)

- AI generation experience FAVORED (Veo 3, Nanobanana, or similar)

- Good working with a team

- Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

- Availability for 6-8h a day (never more, sometimes less)

- Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever needed as long as mostly consistent)

- Can take payments through Wise

- PH or similar time zone

title: Automation Specialist
description:
About Star Stop

Star Stop is a top-ranked convenience store operator in Texas, consistently recognized among the Top 100 Convenience Store Chains in the United States. With locations across Houston, Austin, and San Antonio, we continue to scale by investing in operational excellence, systems, and automation.



Position Overview

We are seeking a highly capable Automation Specialist to design, build, and maintain AI-driven and system-level automations that reduce manual work and increase operational efficiency. This role works closely with leadership and internal teams to connect tools, streamline workflows, and ensure our systems operate cleanly and reliably.

This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys turning chaos into structure and manual processes into automated systems.



Key Responsibilities

Build, manage, and optimize automation workflows using n8n

Integrate internal systems across Slack,
, CRMs, spreadsheets, and project management tools

Design API- and webhook-based automations to sync data and trigger actions

Implement AI-assisted workflows where appropriate (e.g., automated routing, summaries, notifications)

Maintain and improve CRM data flows, records, and system integrity

Set up and manage Slack automations, bots, and workflow integrations

Monitor automation performance, troubleshoot failures, and improve reliability

Document workflows, logic, and system architecture for internal use

Identify inefficiencies and proactively propose automation solutions



Qualifications

Proven experience as an Automation Specialist or similar role

Strong hands-on experience with n8n

Solid understanding of APIs, webhooks, and system integrations

Experience working with CRMs, spreadsheets, and operational tools

High attention to detail and structured problem-solving skills

Strong communication skills and ability to work independently

Comfortable in a fast-paced, execution-focused environment

Must own a MacBook and iPhone

Reliable high-speed internet connection

title: Full-Time Paid Ads Specialist (Meta + Google Ads + GoHighLevel)
description:
We're a patient advocacy organization based in Arizona that helps people access affordable dental implant care across the United States. We partner with dental practices in multiple states and run done-for-you patient acquisition, from ads to booked appointments through monthly open house events.



Our founder built this organization from his own experience as a patient who spent nearly $9,000 on treatments that could have been avoided, so this mission is personal. We're a small, fast-moving team scaling to 20-50 partner practices nationwide.



We're looking for a full-time Paid Ads Specialist to take ownership of our advertising, landing pages, and marketing automations.

What you'll own:



Meta Ads 
/Instagram): lead gen and purchase campaigns, geo-targeted to specific US cities

Google Ads: Search, Performance Max, Local Services Ads

Landing pages: build and optimize in GoHighLevel (GHL)

GHL automations: workflows, triggers, pipelines, follow-up sequences

Weekly reporting across 5-10 partner practice ad accounts



What we need:



2+ years of hands-on experience managing Meta AND Google Ads (conversion campaigns, not boosted posts)

Experience running lead gen, appointment booking, and purchase campaigns

Ability to build high-converting landing pages in GHL (or similar tools with willingness to learn GHL quickly)

Experience setting up automations and workflows in GHL or similar platforms (ActiveCampaign, HubSpot, etc.)

Comfortable with Pixel, GTM, and GA4 setup and troubleshooting

Self-directed: you spot issues and flag them before anyone asks



Nice to have:



Dental or healthcare lead gen experience

Google Ads or Meta Blueprint certifications

Canva skills for quick ad creative edits



Working hours: Full 8-hour shift on US Mountain Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM MST) or US Central Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST). 



This is non-negotiable as we need real-time collaboration during US business hours.



How to apply: Please submit your application through the form linked below. You must include a 3-5 minute Loom video walking through a campaign you've managed. 



Show your screen, open the ad account, walk us through the campaign structure, targeting, results (CPL, ROAS, conversions), and explain what you optimized and why.



Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



You will hear from us within 3-5 business days. 



Shortlisted candidates will do a 20-minute video interview.

title: Nominee Coordinator (Remote + Field)
description:
About the Role:

We help international clients set up Hong Kong companies legally. We need a reliable, people-oriented coordinator in Metro Manila to find and onboard Filipino individuals willing to act as nominee directors — a simple, legal, and paid role that requires minimal time commitment from the nominee.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Find and approach people in your network willing to take on a paid nominee director role

Meet them in person to explain the role, collect documents, and handle verification steps

Coordinate video calls with our Hong Kong legal team for final onboarding

Keep track of contacts, appointments, and documentation



You'll be working alone and be your own boss.

We'll be working in direct contact to build this ssystem together, make it fluent and well organized.

Long term relationship, not a one time job.



REQUIREMENTS:

Based in Metro Manila

A natural networker — you know people and can easily approach new ones

Gets around the city comfortably and independently

title: Funnel Developer — Mobile App Paywall Funnels
description:
AI Studio 10 is a mobile app studio building AI-native consumer products. Our apps run on subscription models, which means the web-to-app funnel is one of the most important assets we own — it's where a cold ad click turns into a paying subscriber before they ever hit the App Store.

We're hiring a Funnel Developer based in the Philippines to build, ship, and iterate on high-converting web funnels using platforms like FunnelFox, Web2Wave, Funnelish, or equivalent. If you've built quiz funnels, onboarding flows, or paywall pages for subscription apps and you genuinely enjoy the craft of turning a visitor into a subscriber, this is for you.

What you'll own

You'll be the person who takes a funnel from Figma mock (or a rough brief) to a live, tracked, A/B-tested page shipping traffic within days — not weeks. This is a hands-on build role, not a strategy role.

Specifically:

– Building web funnels end-to-end in FunnelFox, Web2Wave, or similar no-code/low-code funnel platforms

– Implementing quiz flows, personalisation logic, dynamic paywalls, and checkout pages

– Setting up tracking properly — pixel events, server-side tagging, Stripe/RevenueCat integration, attribution handoff to AppsFlyer

– Running A/B tests: new variants live every week, clean test setups, clear reads

– Page speed, mobile rendering, and cross-device QA — these funnels live on mobile, they need to feel native

– Small front-end tweaks in HTML/CSS/JS when the platform can't do what we need

– Working closely with the UA team and creative team to match funnel angle to ad angle

What we're looking for

– 2+ years building web funnels, ideally for mobile subscription apps or DTC

– Hands-on experience with FunnelFox, Web2Wave, Funnelish, Unbounce, or similar — you can ship without help

– Comfortable with HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript for custom tweaks

– Strong understanding of tracking: Meta CAPI, TikTok events, server-side GTM, Stripe webhooks

– A/B testing mindset — you think in variants, hypotheses, and statistical significance, not vibes

– Attention to detail on mobile UX — pixel-level care, fast loads, no broken flows

– Strong written English and comfortable working async with a remote team

Bonus points

– Experience with Bible, wellness, self-improvement, or AI consumer app categories

– Familiar with RevenueCat, Adapty, or Superwall on the app side of the handoff

– Have shipped funnels doing meaningful volume ($10k+/day ad spend)

– Basic design sense — you can tweak a Figma layer without breaking it

The setup

Remote, based in the Philippines. Full-time, salary paid monthly in USD. Overlap hours with London for sync calls; the rest of the week is async. You'll work directly with the founder and the UA team, with a fast feedback loop and real ownership over what you ship.

How to apply

Send us links to 2–3 funnels you've actually built — doesn't matter if they're live or archived, we want to see the craft. Include a short note on what you were optimising for and one thing you'd change now. CV is welcome but the funnels are what we'll look at first.

title: Developer Short-Term Rental PMS (property management system)
description:
We're building a new operating system for short-term rentals — the kind of platform that replaces the tab-switching, spreadsheet-juggling, five-tools-duct-taped-together reality of running an STR portfolio today. We're early, we're moving fast, and we're hiring the people who'll build it with us.

We're looking for a Full-Stack Developer with deep short-term rental domain knowledge to help build the core platform. This is not a role where you learn the industry on the job. We want someone who already understands how STR actually works — the operators, the channels, the edge cases — because that knowledge will shape what we build as much as the code will.

What you'll own

You'll work across the stack on the features that matter most to operators: bookings, calendars, pricing, messaging, cleaning, reporting, owner statements. You'll build integrations with the platforms and tools the industry already runs on — and the workflows that sit on top of them.

Specifically:

– Integrations with Airbnb, 
, Vrbo, and the wider STR ecosystem — channel managers, pricing tools, payment providers, smart locks, cleaning platforms

– Core product features: multi-calendar logic, rate and availability sync, guest messaging flows, automated workflows, reporting dashboards

– Backend architecture: APIs, webhooks, queues, database design for booking and property data at scale

– Frontend work where needed — dashboards and operator-facing tools that feel fast and actually get used

– The unglamorous but critical layer: handling sync failures, reconciling conflicting data across channels, building systems that don't break at 2am

– Working directly with the founder and early team to turn product direction into shipped features

What we're looking for

– 2–4 years building production web applications, full-stack or strong backend with frontend competence

– Real short-term rental domain knowledge — you've worked on PMS, channel manager, pricing, or STR ops software before, or you've run and operated STR properties yourself at a meaningful scale

– You understand the operator's world: why calendar sync is harder than it looks, what makes a messaging automation actually useful, why pricing tools integrate the way they do

– Fluent with REST APIs, webhooks, and the real-world mess of third-party integrations — rate limits, auth quirks, silent failures, stale data

– Comfortable with a modern stack: TypeScript/Node, Python, Postgres, React. Pragmatic about tools, opinionated about quality

– You ship. Mid-level here means you take a loose spec and come back with working software, not a list of questions

– Strong written English, comfortable working async with a small distributed team

Bonus points

– Have worked at or built on top of Hostaway, Guesty, Hospitable, Lodgify, Uplisted, OwnerRez, or similar

– Familiar with PriceLabs, Wheelhouse, or Beyond Pricing integrations

– Direct experience with Airbnb's API (it's its own beast)

– Have built messaging automations, dynamic pricing logic, or revenue management tooling

– Early-stage experience — comfortable with ambiguity, fast iteration, and changing direction when the product demands it

The setup

Remote, global. Full-time preferred. You'll work directly with the founder and a small early team, with a tight feedback loop and meaningful ownership — what you build ships to real operators, not a staging environment.

How to apply

Send us something you've actually shipped in the STR space — a GitHub repo, an integration you wrestled with, a tool you built, a case study. CV welcome. The work matters more than the credentials.

title: YouTube Long-Form Faceless Video Editor (20–40 min)
description:
We’re looking for a skilled video editor to create engaging **faceless long-form YouTube content** (20–40 minutes per video).



**What you’ll do:**



* Edit long-form videos using provided source material

* Add voiceover (from script)

* Insert background music

* Cut and rearrange B-roll footage to match the narrative

* Incorporate interview clips from the original video

* Add ~10 relevant images per video (related to the topic or person)



**Our workflow:**



* We extract B-roll from original footage

* We transcribe and rewrite the script (using Descript and ChatGPT)

* You align visuals with narration for a smooth, engaging story

* Focus is on storytelling and retention, not perfect sync



**What we’re looking for:**



* Experience editing YouTube long-form content (faceless content is a plus)

* Strong storytelling skills

* Clean, modern editing style

* Good pacing and retention-focused editing



**To apply:**

Send:



1. 2–3 examples of long-form videos you’ve edited

2. Your rate per video (or per minute)

3. A short note about your editing approach



Long-term collaboration available.

title: Tax Advisor (Big 4 experience required)
description:
Company: Prime Path Advisory — A remote tax strategy firm serving high-income individuals, and business owners. We help clients save $50K–$300K+ per year through proactive tax planning and done-for-you implementation.



Job Description: We are looking for a smart, reliable, and detail-oriented Tax & Finance Advisor to join our remote team. This is a full-time role for someone who has operated at the highest levels of the accounting profession and holds themselves to exacting standards of accuracy and excellence. We strongly prefer candidates with 3+ years of experience at a Big Four firm (Deloitte, PwC, EY, or KPMG) or an equivalent top-tier accounting/advisory firm. You must hold an active U.S. EA or CPA license.



Responsibilities:

* Responding to tax and finance-related inquiries from leads and clients via
 or client portal

* Drafting clear, thoughtful replies that reflect U.S. tax planning insights

* Researching IRS rules and strategies to support client-specific planning

* Preparing and reviewing U.S. tax returns (1040, 1120S, 1065, Schedule E, etc.)

* Supporting clients with real estate, business, and entity-level tax strategies

* Supporting the sales team in answering technical questions prospects may have

* Onboarding clients and following up with them to make sure they’re going through the strategy in a reasonable time frame and making sure nothing falls through the cracks

* Helping maintain client files, organize deliverables, and document planning notes

* Collaborating with our marketing team to develop ideas for tax-related content,
 campaigns, and educational material



Requirements:

* Active U.S. EA or CPA license (non-negotiable)

* 3+ years at a Big Four firm (Deloitte, PricewaterhouseCoopers, Ernst & Young, or KPMG) or an equivalent top-tier accounting/advisory firm

* 7+ years of experience in U.S. tax preparation (individual and/or small business returns)

* Familiarity with ProConnect, TaxDome, QuickBooks, Drake, or similar tax software

* Excellent written English (you'll draft client-facing
s and content ideas)

* Comfortable with IRS research and interpreting publications

* Understanding of common U.S. tax strategies (QBI, S-corp, SEP IRA, cost segregation, etc.)

* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

* High personal standards for accuracy, you catch your own errors before anyone else does



Bonus Points:

* Experience with real estate tax strategies or investor clients

* 3+ years of experience in tax advisory/planning

* Background or skills in sales, marketing, or content collaboration

* Experience with leveraged charitable donations, solar depreciation, or heavy equipment strategies



How to Apply: Send your resume and a short Loom or Zoom Clip (1–2 minutes) explaining your Big Four experience to: 

Important: In the subject line of your
, you must include: Tax Advisor (X years of Big Four experience)

Applications that do not follow this subject line format will be automatically disqualified.

title: Shopify Developer
description:
we have a  direct-to-consumer solid-wood furniture brand selling heirloom pieces across the UK and US. Our product is beautiful. Our store needs to match.

We're hiring a Shopify Developer who treats the storefront like a portfolio piece — someone who can build pages that feel like a premium editorial site, not a template with the colours swapped. If you can show us work that makes us stop scrolling, we want to talk.

What you'll own

You'll own the storefront as a craft surface — the place where a visitor d
 whether we're a £200 flat-pack brand or a £2,000 heirloom brand. That decision gets made in the first five seconds, and it's made visually.

Specifically:

– Building and shipping custom Shopify theme development — Liquid, sections, blocks, metafields, metaobjects

– Designing and implementing landing pages, collection pages, and product pages that feel bespoke, not templated

– Interactive front-end work: scroll-driven animations, hover states, image sequences, subtle motion that elevates without distracting

– Performance and Core Web Vitals — luxury doesn't mean slow, it means fast and beautiful

– Collaborating on creative direction with the founder — you'll often be given a reference, a brief, and trust

– App integrations and theme extensions where needed (reviews, upsells, financing, subscriptions)

– Maintenance, small fixes, and the ongoing pace of storefront iteration

What we're looking for

– 2–4 years building on Shopify, with deep Liquid fluency and comfort in Shopify 2.0 architecture

– A portfolio that proves taste — we want to see live URLs of stores you've built or meaningfully contributed to. This matters more than anything else on this list.

– Strong front-end fundamentals: HTML, CSS (modern — Grid, Flex, container queries), vanilla JS. Frameworks where they help, not where they show off.

– Comfortable with animation libraries (GSAP, Framer Motion for Hydrogen, Lottie) and knowing when not to use them

– Design sensibility — you can take a Figma file and make it better on the way to code, not worse

– Understanding of performance: lazy loading, image optimisation, Lighthouse scores that actually hit

– Strong written English, async-friendly, self-directed

Bonus points

– Experience on premium or luxury DTC brands — furniture, interiors, fashion, or adjacent

– Worked with Shopify Hydrogen or headless setups

– Familiar with Klaviyo, 
, Rebuy, Loop, Gorgias, or the usual premium-DTC app stack

– Motion design or animation background

– Comfortable collaborating on creative direction, not just execution

The setup

Remote, global. Full-time or long-term contract — tell us what works. You'll work directly with the founder with real creative latitude. If you do great work, you'll get more of it to do.

How to apply

Send us live links to 3–5 Shopify stores you've built or worked on, with a one-line note on what you specifically contributed. That's the first thing we'll look at. CV optional. Cover letter optional. The work is the application.

title: **Experienced ONLY** Disposition Manager - Real Estate Investment Company (USA)
description:
We are REI Equity, a leading real estate investment company that helps homeowners sell their properties quickly and efficiently. We are looking for a skilled and proactive Disposition Manager to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for taking signed deals from the acquisition team and ensuring they are brought to the finish line smoothly.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage the full lifecycle of real estate deals, from contract signing to closing.

Coordinate with title companies, buyers, and sellers to facilitate smooth transactions.

Oversee documentation, ensure contracts are properly executed, and manage any required follow-up.

Handle any complications or roadblocks in the closing process, including managing tenant situations or repair negotiations.

Provide consistent communication and updates to all parties involved to ensure timely and successful closings.

Work closely with the acquisition team to ensure a seamless handoff of deals.



Qualifications:

Experience in real estate, particularly in disposition or transaction coordination.

Strong organizational and multitasking skills.

Excellent communication abilities with both clients and tea
mbers.

Knowledge of real estate contracts, closing processes, and documentation.

Ability to problem-solve and handle last-minute issues that may arise during a transaction.



What We Offer:

Competitive compensation based on experience.

Flexible work schedule (remote).

Opportunity to grow within a fast-paced and dynamic company.

If you're an experienced disposition or transaction manager looking to work with a leading real estate investment firm, we encourage you to apply!

title: Scale 77
description:
We are a fast-growing med spa patient acquisition agency based in the US, and we are looking for a sharp, technically savvy VA to join our team part-time with real potential to grow into a full-time role as we scale.

This is not your average VA role. We need someone who genuinely loves figuring things out, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and can jump between platforms and tasks without missing a beat. If you get excited when you encounter a new piece of software and your first instinct is to figure it out rather than ask for help, this role is for you.

What You Will Be Doing

Your primary responsibility will be building out client backends. This includes setting up GoHighLevel (GHL) sub-accounts, configuring HotProspector dialing accounts, and handling calendar integrations across multiple clients. Each client has a different setup, different software, and a different way of doing things, so no two days will look the same.

Beyond that, you will own the technical side of our operations. If something breaks, if a new integration needs to be built, or if a workflow needs to be fixed, that lands on your plate. You will be our go-to person for anything tech-related until we build out a more structured team around you.

Core Responsibilities



Build and configure GHL sub-accounts for new and existing clients

Set up and manage HotProspector accounts

Build, troubleshoot, and maintain calendar integrations across various platforms (Google Calendar, ClubReady, Jane, PatientNow, Square, and others)

Build and manage automations and workflows using 
 and GHL's native automation tools

Troubleshoot and maintain Google Sheets and light Google Apps Script when needed

Handle any technical tasks that arise across the agency day to day



What We Need You to Know



GoHighLevel (GHL) – you must have hands-on experience building inside the platform, not just using it


 or similar automation tools (Zapier, n8n) – you need to understand how automations and multi-step workflows are built and how to troubleshoot them

Google Calendar integrations – experience syncing calendars across different platforms and solving integration issues in real time

Google Sheets – comfortable building, troubleshooting, and organizing data



What You Will Learn on the Job



HotProspector – we will train you, but you need to be someone who picks up new platforms fast

Our specific client systems and workflows



Who You Are



You are genuinely tech savvy, not just comfortable with computers but someone who actively enjoys solving technical problems

You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to learn faster, troubleshoot smarter, and get things done without waiting to be spoon-fed answers

You are a critical thinker who can hop on a call with a client, encounter a calendar software you have never seen before, and figure out the integration on the spot

You communicate clearly and proactively, especially when something is not working

You take ownership of your tasks and do not need hand-holding to get things done

You are reliable, responsive, and take pride in your work



Why Join Scale 77

This is a ground-floor opportunity with a company that is growing fast. The person who fills this role will have direct exposure to the founders, real responsibility from day one, and a clear path to grow into a full-time, higher-paying position as we expand. We are not looking for someone to fill a seat, we are looking for someone to grow with us.

To Apply

Please include the following in your application:



A brief summary of your GHL experience and what you have built inside the platform

An automation or workflow you have built using 
 or a similar tool and what it did

Any calendar integration experience you have, including what platforms were involved

Your availability and time zone



Applications without these details will not be reviewed.

title: Experienced Real Estate Acquisitions (Full-Time)  - EXPERIENCED ONLY
description:
Are you ready to join a fast-paced, no-nonsense U.S.-based real estate investment company? We’re looking for two full-time Acquisitions Managers who are serious about closing deals, growing with a winning team, and showing up every single day ready to hustle.



This is not a role for someone looking to “try things out.” We need committed professionals with excellent English, sales skills, and a strong work ethic.



We specialize in:



Real estate wholesaling

Novations

Wholetailing

Direct-to-seller cash purchases



We provide daily warm leads, a fully loaded CRM, training, and all the tools you need. You bring the energy, persistence, and drive to lock in deals and close consistently.



What We’re Looking For:



Excellent spoken English — neutral or very minimal accent

Experience in real estate acquisitions or sales is REQUIRED

Full-time availability (40 hours/week)

Confident, ethical, and goal-driven

CRM experience and strong follow-up discipline

Zero tolerance for excuses — no power/internet issues, no ghosting

Must show up every day ready to work — no time-wasters



Compensation:



Base salary + commissions

Earning range: $1,000 to $2,500+ per month — based entirely on performance

Paid training week at $5/hour to get you ramped up

After that, we expect results — and we pay for them



To Apply (Read Carefully):



Send us a voice or video recording introducing yourself and sharing your real estate or sales experience.

Applications without a recording will NOT be considered.



We hire based on:



Communication skills

Attitude & work ethic

Ability to follow clear instructions



This job only works if YOU do. If you’re hungry, skilled, and ready to build something great, we want to hear from you.



Thanks for your time.

title: Technical Writer
description:
A US-based consulting company is looking to hire a hard-working and self-motivated Filipino Technical Writer to create and document processes and procedures for our clients. Impeccable mastery of the English language (both written and verbal) is a must. 



This role is 100% work from home.



Your responsibilities will include but not be limited to:



• Map process flows based on a recording of the consultant interviewing the client. This includes creating flow charts and diagrams. 

• Write high-quality, clear, easy-to-understand step-by-step procedures based on a recording of an interview of a client or videos submitted directly by clients on how they perform certain tasks.

• Organize the material in a cloud-based process documentation software or Learning Management System software. 

• Use videos, screenshots, links, etc to provide a balance between written material and demonstration of the material and to ensure full understanding. 

• Identify points of improvement and communicate it clearly to the consultant you are working with 

• Use our internal systems to communicate about their work and report daily on progress. 





About You:



• 3+ years of experience in technical writing, creating instructions, creating flow charts, process mapping, and process improvement background. 

• Ability to translate highly technical information into easily understandable information

• Very good understanding of the business world and high familiarity with common terms 

• Experience in process documentation and process improvement 

• Ability to duplicate what is said and translate it into writing

• Excellent mastery of the English language including grammar, punctuation and spelling. 

• Good mastery of MS Products (Word, Excel and PowerPoint) and Google suite 

• Detail-oriented, efficient and concise

• Ability to critical thinking and problem-solving





Compensation: 



• Competitive salary

• Training and mentorship

• Awesome culture and work-from-home set-up

• SSS, Philhealth, and Pag-ibig

• Healthcare (HMO)

• 13th Month Pay

• Paid incentive leave 

• Yearly performance review





How to apply:



Please fill out this application form: 
. We will only respond to candidates that meet the above qualifications.

title: Service coordinator & Admin
description:
**What You'll Do**

• Scheduling and dispatching technicians for service calls, installations, and inspections

• Maintaining and updating job calendars to ensure efficient daily planning and technician utilisation

• Reviewing daily reports and identifying faults, repeated activations, or issues requiring action

• Acting as the first point of contact for incoming service requests via phone and

• Liaising with clients to confirm bookings, schedule changes, and job completion updates

• Maintaining up-to-date customer and site records across CRM and internal systems

• Assisting in the preparation of compliance documents, service agreements, and contracts

• Contacting existing customers from our database to follow up on services and maintain regular communication

• Coordinating internal communication between departments and supporting overall workflow efficiency

• Managing stock ordering and liaising with suppliers to ensure availability of materials

• Following up on outstanding payments and maintaining records

• Ensuring consistency and professionalism in all communications and documentation

• Maintaining confidentiality across all client and company matters

• Identifying opportunities to improve processes and contribute to more efficient operations

• Coordinate with our in-field technicians and NZ-based tea
mbers

• Submit a short weekly report on calls,
s, and jobs completed



**What We're Looking For**



*Required:*



• Clear, neutral English speaking voice — you will be calling NZ customers directly

• Strong written English — professional, warm, and natural (not stiff or overly formal)

• 3+ years of experience in office admin, customer service, or virtual assistant roles

• Experience working with a CRM

• Comfortable using Gmail, Google Calendar, and Xero (or willingness to learn)

• Reliable internet connection (at least 25 Mbps) with a backup option (mobile hotspot is fine)

• Own computer with licensed antivirus and a recent operating system

• Quiet, professional home workspace free from background noise

• Available Monday to Friday during NZ business hours



**What We Offer**



• Competitive salary in the PHP 50,000 – 60,000 range based on experience

• 13th month pay (paid in December)

• Monthly internet allowance

• Performance bonus after successful probation (3 months)

• Long-term stable employment with a growing business

• Full training on our systems and processes

• NZ-based VoIP phone number provided

• Direct weekly one-on-one with the General Manager



**Role Details**



• Full-time, 40 hours per week

• Monday to Friday, overlapping with NZ business hours (approx. 5:00 AM – 2:00 PM Manila time)

• Salary: PHP 50,000 – PHP 60,000 per month depending on experience, plus 13th month pay and internet allowance

• Category: Customer Service / Admin / Virtual Assistant



**About You**



You enjoy working in a structured but fast-paced environment. You are comfortable managing multiple priorities and can adapt quickly when plans change.



To be successful in this role, you will need:



• Previous experience in a coordination, administration, or operations-based role

• Strong organisational skills and the ability to manage time effectively

• Confidence communicating with both clients and internal tea
mbers

• A high level of attention to detail and accuracy

• The ability to stay calm and focused under pressure

• Confidence using systems such as Excel, CRM platforms, and job scheduling tools

• A proactive mindset with the ability to take initiative

• A reliable and team-oriented approach

title: Outbound Sales / Appointment Setter (A-Players Only)
description:
Your Role

- You will be the first point of contact for men actively looking for help. Your job is to engage leads through calls, chat, and follow-ups, qualify them properly, and book high-quality appointments for our Sales Team.

- This is high-volume outbound work, not passive inbound setting.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 1.5–2+ years experience in outbound sales or appointment setting

- Comfortable making 200+ calls per day

- Strong spoken and written English

- Calm, emotionally stable, and confident under pressure

- Able to handle conversations about porn, addiction, and sexual behavior

- Coachable and precise with scripts and frameworks

- Self-motivated and accountable

- Reliable internet and power with backup

- Experience in health, wellness, fitness, or coaching sales is a plus.



What You’ll Do Daily

- Make high-volume outbound calls to warm and cold leads

- Hold real conversations and book qualified appointments

- Follow call and chat frameworks

- Maintain clean CRM notes and activity tracking

- Hit KPIs consistently without reminders



Who You’ll Be Speaking With

- High-functioning and ambitious men

- Private, guarded, and serious once engaged

- Looking for real help, not motivation



What We Offer

- Fully remote role

- Clear scripts, KPIs, and expectations

- Training and ongoing coaching

- Consistent lead flow

- Long-term growth for top performers



About Us

- Elevated Recovery® helps high-functioning men overcome porn addiction and rebuild discipline, relationships, and sexual health. We have helped 15,000+ men over the last 14 years.



Do NOT Apply If



- You avoid volume or pressure

- You need constant motivation

- You dislike structure or accountability



How to Apply

- Send your resume and a short note explaining why this role fits you. 



Secret Code: 21



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: 3D Event Render Artist Needed (Photorealistic, Experiential Event Concepts)
description:
We are building out a creative content series for my event production brand where I develop experiential event concepts and need a 3D artist to visually bring them to life. I will provide the concept, direction, and references. I am looking for someone who can take those ideas and create photorealistic renders of what the experience would look like in real life. This is about visualizing event environments in a way that feels real, immersive, and elevated.



What I need:

Photorealistic 3D renders of event concepts including stages, pop-ups, brand activations, and guest experience 
nts. Some concepts may be playful or unconventional, but the execution should always feel clean, modern, and realistic. Renders should include strong lighting, depth, and materials, with camera angles that feel like real event photography.



We will start with one test render. If it is a strong fit, this will turn into ongoing work as part of a content series. There will also be the opportunity for bonuses along the way.



Work will be structured as a fixed price per render.



What I will provide:

Concept ideas, creative direction, reference images, and feedback with specific notes.



Ideal Candidate:

Strong experience with photorealistic environment rendering. Experience with event design, spatial design, or experiential work is a plus. Must be able to follow direction, communicate clearly, and deliver within agreed timelines.



To Apply:

Please include 2 to 4 samples of photorealistic event renders, your typical turnaround time per render, and the software you use such as Blender, 3DS Max, or Cinema 4D.

 ME DIRECTLY OFF PLATFORM.

 ME DIRECTLY. I only use this platform to communicate with candidates. Candidates that

title: Full-Time AI Developer (ChatGPT + Cursor + SaaS)
description:
Full-Time AI Developer (ChatGPT + Cursor + SaaS)



We are hiring a full-time AI Developer to help build, maintain, and improve real SaaS applications.



You will work directly with the founder on live production systems used by real customers.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow into a strong developer using AI tools.







About the Role



This is NOT just a learning role.



You will:

• Work on real applications

• Fix real bugs

• Ship real features

• Deploy to live servers



We move fast and expect consistent daily output.





What You’ll Do

• Use ChatGPT + Cursor to generate and fix code

• Build features (frontend + backend)

• Debug and fix bugs

• Work with APIs (REST, webhooks, JSON)

• Maintain existing SaaS applications

• Use GitHub (commits, branches, pull, push)

• Deploy updates to AWS EC2 servers

• Manage basic server tasks (restart apps, check logs)

• Test your work before submitting

• Provide updates throughout the day

• Be available on chat during work hours (Pacific Standard Time)







Deployment & Infrastructure (IMPORTANT)



You will be working with live servers.



Basic experience REQUIRED:

• SSH into servers (EC2)

• PM2 (start/restart apps)

• Pull latest code from GitHub

• Basic Nginx awareness (reload/config)

• Manage .env files



Bonus:

• Postgres basics

• Reading logs and debugging crashes





Tech Stack

• JavaScript / Node.js

• React (basic)

• APIs / JSON

• GitHub (REQUIRED)

• ChatGPT / Cursor (REQUIRED)





Requirements



You MUST:

• Have basic JavaScript knowledge

• Know how to use ChatGPT or AI tools for coding

• Be comfortable with GitHub

• Have basic AWS / server experience (SSH, deploys)

• Be reliable and responsive

• Be a fast learner

• Follow instructions exactly

• Communicate clearly in English





Do NOT Apply If

• You cannot work full-time consistently

• You respond late or disappear during work hours

• You don’t test your work

• You have never used SSH or deployed to a server

• You rely on AI but don’t understand the code





Work Schedule

• Full-time (40 hours/week)

• Must work during U.S. daytime (PST)

• Must be available on chat during work hours



Salary

• $400 – $600/month (based on experience)

• Paid weekly at the beginning

• Opportunity for raises based on performance



What We’re Looking For



We are not looking for the most experienced developer.



We are looking for someone who is:

• Reliable

• Responsive

• Motivated

• Detail-oriented

• Willing to learn fast

• Has a great attitude and personality





Perks

• Long-term stable work

• Work directly with a founder

• Learn real SaaS development

• We pay for ChatGPT, Cursor, and AI tools

• Opportunity to grow into a developer role



HOW TO APPLY (VERY IMPORTANT)



You MUST complete ALL steps below:



1. Short Written Intro

• Your background

• Your experience with coding or AI tools



2. Answer This Question (Text)



What happens when you run:

"pm2 restart all"



3. Loom Video (REQUIRED – 3–5 minutes)



In your Loom, answer ALL of the following:

1. Introduce yourself on video

2. Show how you use ChatGPT or Cursor to:

• Build something OR fix a bug

3. Describe any experience you have with:

• GitHub

• AWS / servers / deployments

4. Explain how you would handle a task you don’t understand

5. Tell us why you want this job

6. Confirm you can work full-time during PST hours





Applications WITHOUT a Loom video will be ignored.





Final Note



We are building real products and moving fast.



If you are reliable, motivated, and serious about growing as a developer using AI tools — this is a great opportunity.

Server (Cloudpepper)

title: Sales and Operations Support Coordinator (Remote)
description:
???? Sales and Operations Support Coordinator (Remote – Full-Time)



Love Fast Follow-Up, Clean Systems, and Helping Opportunities Move? We Need Your Brain.

At Property Rush, we do not just manage properties. We support sales activity, investor communication, and day-to-day execution through disciplined systems and strong follow-through. As we continue to grow, we are looking for a Sales and Operations Support Coordinator to help keep our lead activity, frontline communication, CRM records, and inquiry routing clean, visible, and moving.



This is not a passive support role. We need someone who can handle high-volume communication, support active follow-up, keep systems updated, and make sure opportunities do not get lost in the workflow. You will help protect the business by keeping sales-support and communication execution organized, responsive, and trackable. 

________________________________________



???? Why You’ll Love This Role



Immediate Impact:

Your work helps the business stay responsive and keeps both opportunities and inquiries from going cold.



Clear Ownership:

You own the sales-support, communication, and routing layer that helps the rest of the team move faster.



Fast-Paced + Structured:

We already have the systems and moving parts. We need someone who can keep them current, clean, and visible.



Remote + Long-Term:

Stable role with a team that values follow-through, responsiveness, and strong execution. 

________________________________________

title: Freelance Credit Controller – Outbound Calls & Debt Recovery
description:
Our client is a well-established UK-based accountancy firm with over 15 years of trading history. We're growing, and we need a reliable, confident phone professional to support our credit control operations on a part-time freelance basis.

The Role

You'll be working through our CRM to contact clients with overdue balances. The job is straightforward but requires professionalism and persistence:



Calling overdue clients to chase outstanding invoices

Recording the reason for non-payment and any promised payment dates in the CRM

Re-sending invoices and payment reminders via
 where needed

Escalating unresolved cases as appropriate



This is primarily a calling role. You'll be the voice of the business when it comes to recovering outstanding payments, so your communication skills matter above everything else.

What We're Looking For



Clear, professional spoken English — this is non-negotiable

Confidence and composure on the phone, especially in awkward or resistant conversations

Previous experience in credit control, accounts receivable, or outbound sales (strongly preferred)

Ability to accurately log call outcomes, next steps, and payment commitments in a CRM

Reliable, self-managed, and able to work part-time hours consistently



Pay



$6.75 USD/hour base rate

Commission paid on reconciled accounts (discussed at interview)



How to Apply

Please include in your application:



A brief summary of your relevant phone experience

Any specific credit control or collections background you have



Short-listed applicants will be invited to a brief voice/video call to assess communication style before any offer is made.

title: Customer Support & Admin VA (WordPress / UK Clients - Long Term Role)
description:
We are a UK-based web design company working primarily with local government websites. We manage hundreds of websites and receive a steady flow of client requests via
.



We are looking for a reliable, proactive Virtual Assistant to take ownership of our support inbox and help manage day-to-day client communication.

Your responsibilities will include:



• Managing our support inbox (responding to client
s)

• Understanding client requests and asking the right follow-up questions

• Categorising requests (simple / requires work / urgent)

• Sending clear, friendly, and professional replies

• Creating and assigning tasks for technical work

• Following up with clients when needed

• Keeping everything organised and moving forward



Important:



You are not expected to know everything on day one.



However, you must be:



• A strong written communicator (very important)

• Organised and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working independently

• Willing to learn quickly



Bonus (not required but helpful):

Working style:



• UK clients (clear, polite communication required)

• You will draft replies first - we will review and help you improve

• Over time, you will take full ownership of the inbox



Salary:

To apply, please do the following:

“Hi, I can’t access my website and something looks broken. Can you fix this?”

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: Online Product Sourcing
description:
Position Details



Position: Sourcing Virtual Assistant

Platform: Walmart (Online Reselling)

Employment Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote – Philippines

Hours: 40 hours/week (aligned with employer's time zone)



About Us

We are a growing e-commerce business focused on online retail arbitrage and reselling through Walmart's marketplace. Our mission is to identify profitable product opportunities, build smart sourcing systems, and scale our business efficiently. We believe in investing in our people — we're looking for a long-term tea
mber who wants to grow alongside the business, not just fill a role.



Role Summary

As a Sourcing Virtual Assistant, you will be the engine behind our product discovery pipeline. You will research, analyze, and identify products from online retailers and suppliers that can be profitably resold on Walmart's platform. You will work closely with the business owner, receive ongoing coaching and training, and play a key role in driving the business forward.

This is a full-time, long-term position ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, analytical, and genuinely excited about e-commerce.



Key Responsibilities

Product Sourcing & Research



Search online retailers, clearance sites, and supplier catalogs to find resellable products

Identify products with strong sell-through rates and healthy profit margins on Walmart

Use sourcing tools and software (training provided) to discover leads efficiently

Build and maintain a consistent daily pipeline of product sourcing leads



Profitability Analysis



Calculate ROI, profit margins, and net profit per unit for each product

Factor in all costs: purchase price, shipping, fees, and taxes

Evaluate competitor pricing and sales velocity on Walmart

Identify products that meet or exceed defined profitability thresholds



Data Management & Reporting



Log all sourced products into spreadsheets or tracking tools

Provide clear, organized daily or weekly sourcing reports to the business owner

Track the performance of sourced products once listed

Flag trends, seasonal opportunities, and high-performing product categories



Communication & Collaboration



Attend regular check-ins and coaching sessions with the business owner

Ask questions, seek feedback, and apply new strategies quickly

Communicate proactively if issues arise with leads or tools





Requirements

Required:



Fluent in written and spoken English

Strong analytical skills and comfort working with numbers

Proficiency with Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets

Reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace

Available full-time (40 hours/week) with consistent schedule

Self-motivated and productive in a remote environment



Preferred (not required — training provided):



Previous experience in e-commerce, online arbitrage, or product sourcing

Familiarity with Walmart Seller Center or similar platforms

Experience with sourcing tools such as Tactical Arbitrage or Keepa

Background in data entry, research, or virtual assistant work





Who We're Looking For

We want a long-term tea
mber, not just someone to complete tasks. The ideal candidate is:



Coachable — You welcome feedback, follow instructions carefully, and apply what you learn

Growth-oriented — You want to develop your skills and grow with the business over time

Detail-focused — You catch errors, double-check your work, and take pride in accuracy

Consistent — You show up every day, meet deadlines, and communicate proactively

Curious — You enjoy learning how e-commerce works and stay motivated by finding great deals





What We Offer



Full-time, stable remote position with long-term growth potential

Comprehensive training and ongoing coaching — no prior Walmart experience required

Clear performance expectations and a supportive work environment

Opportunity to expand your role and income as the business grows



To apply you must fill out this google form
salary: Starting at $3 an hour during training

title: UGC Creator & Video Editor for an AI SaaS TikTok video & Instagram reels
description:
We need someone who can take an AI product and make it go viral.

We are building an AI SaaS platform that acts as a strategic consultant, built to think like a top-tier business consultant and deliver the kind of reports consulting firms charge thousands for. We're launching fast, and we need the right person to help us dominate the feed.



The Mission



Your job is simple: create high-converting UGC-style content that communicates the SaaS value, test angles and hooks at scale, and post across 2-3 TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube accounts. We don't want "pretty" videos. We want videos that convert. We are targeting the US market.

We are looking for two profiles: UGC recording and video editing for short-form content. We can open these as two separate roles, or if you master both, even better. The priority is UGC recording. Video editing is a strong nice-to-have.



What We Provide



•?  ?A curated dataset of high-converting video formats from our niche

•?  ?Proven hooks, winning angles, and ready-to-use scripts

•?  ?Copywriting support



What You'll Do



•?  ?Produce 10+ short-form videos per week (TikTok / Reels / Shorts)

•?  ?Record reactions, breakdowns, and comparisons (vs ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

•?  ?Manage and publish across multiple accounts

We value creators who proactively suggest new hooks and storytelling angles.



Who We're Looking For



•?  ?Real experience running and growing TikTok and/or Instagram accounts

•?  ?Deep understanding of hooks, algorithms, retention, and stop-scroll psychology

•?  ?Comfortable on camera, energetic, and fast

•?  ?Clean editing skills and strong storytelling instincts (Capcut or equivalent)

•?  ?Fluent in English

•?  ?Genuine interest in business, AI, and how products actually grow

If you don't have real, proven short-form growth experience, this is not for you. Apply only if you know how to make content work, not just produce it.



What We Offer



•?  ?Full-time or part-time engagement, flexible structure

•?  ?Monthly compensation + performance-based bonuses

•?  ?50% lifetime affiliate commission once the collaboration proves itself



How to Apply



Send us your portfolio: TikTok accounts you've run, videos you've created, UGC content you're proud of. Anything that shows you can make content work.

We prioritize applicants who include a video from their existing portfolio — a UGC piece, a product demo, a talking-head breakdown, anything that shows your style and your understanding of what makes content convert.

A short intro video (1-4 min via Loom, YouTube, or similar) is welcome but not mandatory. If you record one, keep it tight: who you are, why this role, and let your personality come through. We're hiring a human, not a resume.

title: BDR / Growth Partner - Global Digital Media
description:
Fjord Media Group is a boutique media agency expanding our partner operations in the LatAm and APAC regions. We represent a portfolio of premium entertainment software and are looking for 5 elite Business Development Representatives (BDRs) to help us scale our creator partnerships.



THIS IS NOT A DATA ENTRY OR ADMIN ROLE.



We are looking for "Hunters"—people who can identify, contact, and onboard high-traffic partners in the digital entertainment/app space.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Identify high-volume
/Discord Community Admins, Twitch/Kick streamers, and Influencers in your region.

• Initiate first-contact outreach using our provided scripts.

• Book "Warm Leads" into a 3-way call/chat with our Director to finalize partnerships.



THE COMPENSATION:

We prioritize high-performance partners who want to build a "Book of Business."



• The Deal: You receive a 3% Lifetime Override on the gross revenue generated by every partner you onboard.

• The Potential: If you onboard a high-traffic partner, you earn a recurring commission for as long as that partner is active.

• Payouts: Weekly (Every Tuesday) via digital wallet.



WHY YOU SHOULD JOIN:

You are not just a "recruiter." You are a partner in a European-based media network. We provide the tracking infrastructure, the client-facing contracts, and the administrative support. You provide the hustle.



THE VETTING PROCESS (MANDATORY):



Due to the high volume of applications, we do not conduct initial interviews via the platform messaging system.



To be considered for this role, you must apply using the standard platform button and attach your Resume/CV as a PDF.



Mandatory: You must ensure your
 Username and
 Address are clearly visible at the top of your attached PDF resume. Our recruitment team will review your file and contact shortlisted candidates directly via
 within 24 hours to schedule the skills assessment.

title: Digital Marketing & Appointment Setting Specialist — Remote, Full-Time or Long-Term Contract
description:
Digital Marketing & Appointment Setting Specialist — Remote, Full-Time or Long-Term Contract





Who We Are:



We are EmployJoy.ai. We built an Al-powered recruiting system for the house cleaning and commercial cleaning industries. We help service businesses streamline their hiring process and fix their talent pipeline. 



We are aiming for strong revenue growth in 2026 and beyond. That's where you come in.





Who We Need:



We need someone who does two things well: digital marketing AND outbound appointment setting.



Not a trainee. Not someone starting from zero. You've run campaigns. You've made outbound calls. You know what a quota feels like.



Here's what matters most: your mindset.



We live by the optimize — measure — learn cycle. Every project has a number. Every call gets logged. Every result shapes what we do next.



If that sounds like how you already work, keep reading.





Are You This Person?:



1. Accountable. You own your numbers. You don't blame tools, the market, or the algorithm.

2. Deadline-driven. You hit dates. When something slips, you flag it early.

3. Data-first. You check dashboards before you share opinions.

4. Measurement-minded. You think in baselines, targets, and deltas.

5. Persistent. You can make 40 calls in a day and keep your voice and focus.

6. Curious. You ask "what's working?" and "why?" every single week.

7. Honest. You say when something isn't working. No sugarcoating, no spin.





What You'll Do: 



You'll run two sides of the same engine: marketing that brings in leads, and calls that turn those leads into booked demos.



Digital Marketing:

(1) SEO and AEO (AI Engine Optimization) to drive qualified search traffic

(2) Build and improve
 funnels to lift conversion rates

(3) Run referral campaigns to get more leads from current clients

(4) Grow our online review volume and hit monthly review goals

(5) Run multi-channel outreach 
, LinkedIn DMs, phone)

(6) Run social media campaigns with positive ROI

(7) Run Reddit and Quora campaigns that drive SEO and leads

(8) Track conversions by marketing channel

(9) Report daily, weekly, and monthly on every campaign

(10) Support sales operations



Appointment Setting (Demo Calls):

(1) Make 40 outbound calls a day and log every touch in our CRM

(2) Run 5 call systems over a 2-week cycle (cold, warm, follow-up, re-engagement, referral) — and improve them as you learn

(3) Use our scripts for cold and warm contacts. Rewrite what isn't working.

(4) Before each call: research the prospect's website, send a personalized LinkedIn note, and fill out a prep sheet so the demo is tight. Think through different call scenarios before you dial.

(5) After a booked appointment: send reminders, a short "what to expect" note, and a helpful report. Space them based on how far out the meeting is.

(6) Hit at least an 80% show rate on booked appointments

(7) Earn a bonus on every appointment that converts to a paying customer

(8) Every project has a goal. Every goal has a number. Every number gets reviewed.

(9) The mix of digital marketing tasks and appointment setting tasks varies.  We anticipate at least 60% of the time is for appointment setting.





What We Expect From You:



1. You run every campaign and call block on the optimize — measure — learn cycle

2. After 1 month of training, you hit weekly lead and appointment goals, and push to beat them

3. You log every call in the CRM — same day, no exceptions

4. You report your numbers without being asked

5. You commit 40 hours per week





Your Background:



You should have:

1. Real, hands-on digital marketing experience (coursework alone won't cut it)

2. Real outbound calling experience (cold or warm, B2C or B2B)

3. A track record of setting goals, measuring results, and hitting targets

4. Strong writing skills — short, clear, and persuasive (for
s, LinkedIn notes, and call scripts)

5. A clear phone voice and the stamina for 40 calls a day

6. Comfort with GA4, a CRM,
 platforms, and SEO tools

7. A 4-year Bachelor's degree

8. Honesty about what you know and what you still need to learn





Growth Path and Pay:



This role has a clear growth ladder. As your measured results grow, your pay grows.



  Trainee (Foundation Level) — $7/hour minimum

  Level 1 (Entry Professional) — $8/hour minimum

  Level 2 (Intermediate Specialist) — $9/hour minimum

  Level 3 (Advanced Specialist) — $11/hour minimum

  Level 4 (Master Marketer) — $13/hour minimum

  Level 5 (Authority Expert) — $15/hour minimum



Plus: bonus pay for every appointment that converts to a paying customer.



We start most new hires at the lower levels. We move people up based on measured results, not tenure. We're open to both full-time and long-term contract arrangements.



If you want a role where pay follows performance, you'll like how this works. If you want a fixed senior salary on day one, this isn't the right fit.





Benefits



(1) AI tools built into everything we do

(2) Honest, ethical managers

(3) Strong training and development program

(4) Clear path to higher pay and more responsibility

(5) Real support from the team — including our Recruiting and Training Manager and the company President

(6) 6 paid US National Holidays

(7) 5 paid personal days accrued in Year 1

(8) 10 paid personal days accrued in Year 2 and beyond



Our Culture and Values



(1) Direct, honest, empathetic communication

(2) Always learning

(3) Good remote work tools

(4) Team connection (no one left isolated)

(5) Integrity, every time

(6) Data-driven, not ego-driven





How We Hire



This role matters to us. So we take hiring seriously. Our process:



  A short survey

  A work sample (writing + a mock call script)

  A video interview

  1st interview on Zoom

  2nd interview on Zoom

  A simulation conversation — you'll make a live mock demo call



Yes, it's thorough. We're not hiring a contractor. We're hiring a long-term partner who will help shape our startup.



This is a small, crazy team. Or a crazy, small team. Works both ways.



If you read this and thought "this is me" — we want to hear from you.



Your turn.

title: Cleaning Business Sales and Operations
description:
You know what it's like to be great at sales but stuck in a role where nobody notices. Where you close deals and nothing changes. That's not this job.



We're a residential cleaning company running three markets across the US. We need someone who can sell AND operate. Close the deal, then make sure the job actually happens.



YOU MUST HAVE PRIOR EXPERIENCE IN A CLEANING BUSINESS.



Let me be honest about this role. Half of it is sales. The other half is operations: managing a team of independent cleaners who call out sick, run late, miss areas, and need to be rescheduled. Clients get frustrated. Cleaners have bad days. You're the person in the middle making sure nobody falls through the cracks.



If you only want to sell, this isn't the role. If chaos stresses you out, this isn't the role. But if you're the kind of person who handles problems calmly, keeps ten things moving at once, and still picks up the phone with energy — keep reading.



Your schedule:



Saturday & Sunday: 12-hour shifts (US EDT)

Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday: 9:00am – 2:30pm EDT



This is a weekend-heavy role. If that doesn't work for your life, this isn't the right fit, and that's completely fine.



The sales side:



Inbound leads from Google Ads and local service ads. Speed matters, every minute counts

Follow-up sequences with leads who didn't book the first time. You don't give up after one attempt

Lead tracking in our CRM — every call logged, every outcome recorded, no exceptions



Please note that we are an automation and AI-heavy business. Most of the work comes to you in Slack. We try to make this as easy as possible for everyone involved. 



The operations side:



Daily scheduling: assigning cleaners, handling reschedules, covering callouts

Client communication when things go sideways: a cleaner cancels, a job needs to move, a client is unhappy

Cleaner coordination via Slack and text: confirming schedules, managing no-shows, following up on job quality

Sunday lead data entry and reconciliation



What we're looking for:



It sounds like you might be the kind of person who takes ownership of things. Not because someone told you to, but because that's just how you operate. If something's broken, you fix it. If a lead goes quiet, you follow up again. And again. If a cleaner doesn't show, you don't wait for someone to tell you what to do...you're already calling the client and finding a solution.



Strong spoken and written English. You'll be talking to American homeowners on the phone.

Sales ability. You hear "I need to think about it" and you know what to say next.

Calm under pressure. Three things will go wrong at the same time. That's Tuesday.

Reliability over everything. Show up. Do the work. Log the data. The basics are the job.



Compensation:



$900/month base

$3 bonus per booked client

$100 monthly bonus when your close rate hits 50% or higher

The better you are, the more you earn. A strong performer will clear $1,100/month.

We have 2 pay raises planned in the first 6 months. 



Tools we use: Slack, Seatable, BookingKoala, OpenPhone, Google Workspace



About us: We've been operating since 2023. You'll work directly with the owner and our Cebu-based operations manager. Your results are visible immediately and they matter. If you're looking for a place where what you do actually counts, this is it.



How does this role compare to what you're looking for?
