title: Security Operations Specialist — M365, SentinelOne, Guardz | Remote MSP
description:
We are a US-based managed service provider serving clients across the United States. We are hiring a dedicated **Security Operations Specialist** to run daily security monitoring across our customer base.



This is a real SecOps role, not helpdesk. If "security" on your resume means you've seen a dashboard during a helpdesk shift, this isn't the job you're looking for.



The role is behind-the-scenes. You won't be on customer calls. You'll be the eyes on every customer tenant, every day — spotting and containing what matters before it becomes an i
.



What You'll Do, Every Day



- Work Guardz down to zero open issues, remediating silently where possible and flagging only what needs customer-facing reporting

- Review every customer Microsoft 365 tenant using our custom security-controls workflow — sign-in logs, inbox rules, OAuth consents, mail forwarding, audit events

- Investigate SentinelOne threats and suspicious behaviors across all customer endpoints; contain first (disconnect, kill process, quarantine, rollback), document second

- Filter SuperOps RMM alerts for security-relevant signals versus ops noise

- Document every finding in Hudu, per customer, per issue

- When a situation requires customer interaction (e.g., disabling a compromised account), open a ticket for our help desk team to handle the customer-facing work — you do not contact customers directly



Example Workflow



You see impossible travel on a customer's CFO. You pull the sign-in logs and confirm the second sign-in wasn't a VPN. You check mailbox rules — there's a new one auto-deleting messages containing "invoice." You disable the account, revoke active sessions, pull Sent Items to see what already went out, document everything in Hudu, and open a help desk ticket with a clear writeup so the help desk engineer can reach the customer and reset the user. Containment to handoff in under 30 minutes.



What We Require



- Real Microsoft 365 identity and
 security experience. You should be able to explain Conditional Access in your own words, name the baseline policies every tenant should have, and recognize a BEC inbox rule the 
nt you see it.

- **EDR console fluency.** SentinelOne is our stack, but comparable deep experience with CrowdStrike or Microsoft Defender for Endpoint transfers. You should know the native response actions, how to walk a storyline / process tree, and when to contain vs. escalate.

- Multi-tenant MSP experience — or equivalent. You've worked across many customers' environments, not just one enterprise tenant.

- Clear written English for internal alert write-ups. A teammate reading your ticket needs to understand what happened without asking follow-up questions.

- A reliable home setup — primary internet at a minimum of 50 Mbps down / 10 Mbps up, a backup connection, UPS, and a real plan for typhoon outages. Tell us specifically in your application.

- Discretion. You'll have near-Global Admin visibility into customer tenants, including executive mailboxes and financial records. If you've ever read something you shouldn't have in an executive's mailbox and think that's fine, don't apply.



Please Self-Filter Before Applying



This role is not a fit if:



- Your "security" experience is help-desk with some patching on the side

- Your work has been vulnerability management or endpoint patching only, with no identity or
 security exposure

- You cannot tell a concrete, detailed story about an alert you personally investigated end to end — we will ask

- You have monitored Microsoft 365 tenants but never administered one



Compensation & Benefits



- PHP 90,000 – 120,000 per month, commensurate with experience. We will not bait-and-switch you — this is the real range, and where you land depends on your actual depth, not on what we can get away with paying.

- Stable, predictable increases over time. We don't promise you'll double your income; that's not realistic at this compensation tier. What we do commit to is honest, regular raises tied to tenure and performance.

- Certification support — we reimburse exam fees for role-relevant certifications (CCNA, Microsoft Security, SentinelOne, etc.) after you pass. Study materials are evaluated case-by-case.

- Direct reporting line to the owner, not layered under HR or middle management

- Fully remote. No commute, no office visits, ever.



Working Arrangement



- Shift: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Central Time — approximately 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM Manila time (shifts one hour earlier when the US observes daylight saving). You will be working synchronously with the US team during their business hours. Most Filipino professionals who work for US companies expect this, but we're being explicit: if you are not willing to work these hours every workday, do not apply.

- Full-time, 40 hours per week — this is your only job. Moonlighting is a dealbreaker. We are not hiring your spare cycles, and we are not a stackable fourth employer. We want your focused attention on Pinnacle IT, full stop. If you intend to keep another role, part-time or otherwise, do not apply.

- Laptop, tooling, and licenses provided

- Onboarding includes one-on-one time directly with the owner until you are fully aligned on our security posture and tooling



How to Apply



Send your application through OnlineJobs.ph with the following in your cover letter. Generic applications will not be read.



1. A concrete story (5-10 sentences) of one security i
 or alert you personally investigated end-to-end. What did you see, what did you do, what was the outcome? Write this yourself — we read a lot of AI-generated cover letters and can spot them quickly, and we will stop reading.

2. Your current compensation and your target compensation

3. Your home setup — primary internet provider and speed, backup connection, UPS, power outage contingency plan

4. Your availability — current notice period and earliest possible start date

5. Any other current work or commitments (we are hiring your full-time focused attention)

6. A 60-second video introduction where you briefly describe the security i
 story from item #1 above, in your own words. We're not grading you on accent or polish — the test is whether a teammate can understand your technical explanation without asking follow-up questions. If your written cover letter and your spoken explanation don't match in voice and substance, we'll notice.



We review every application that follows these instructions. We do not review applications that skip them.

title: Video Editor for Ecommerce Dropshipping (Meta Ads Specialist)
description:
Are YOU an experienced video editor specializing in Meta Ads for physical products and dropshipping? Can you look at a competitor’s winning ad and immediately understand how to replicate it technically, or transform a script into a winning creative using the most advanced AI tools? If you answered an enthusiastic “YES” to both questions above, KEEP READING.

We run multiple international companies in the ecommerce and education space and we’re looking for a Video Editor (Meta Ads Specialist) to join our creative team.

We need someone to take responsibility for:

Sales-Focused Ad Production: Crafting clean, high-conversion ads (1 to 5 minutes) including Mini-VSLs, AI-UGC, and "Product in Hand" content.

Asset Management & Sourcing: You will be provided with a folder of our selected B-rolls. However, if additional clips are needed, you must source them autonomously and innovatively. The use of traditional stock footage (Shutterstock, Envato, etc.) is strictly FORBIDDEN.

From Script to Finished Product: We provide the scripts; your job is to interpret them visually, choosing the right clips and editing them to create a dynamic, persuasive, and technically flawless product.

AI Tool Research & Implementation: This is your passion. You must stay constantly updated on new AI releases (editing, UGC avatars, video generation). In our weekly calls, we expect you to pitch new software that can revolutionize our workflow.

AI Asset Generation: Hands-on use of the AI Stack (Higgsfield, Sora 2, Veo 3, Arcads, MakeUGC) to create or enhance content.

Visual Optimization: Implementing textual hooks, kinetic typography, and scroll-stopping subtitles.

Position Requirements:

At least 2 years of specific experience: A solid background in Meta Ads for ecommerce brands. You must have worked as an editor for brands generating at least $10k/month in revenue. While respecting privacy, you will be asked to provide examples of these collaborations in the following stages.

Deep Passion for Innovation: This isn't just a job; you must love technology. We want an AI "killer" who stays ahead of the market.

Excellent Problem-Solving Skills: If instructions aren't crystal clear or assets are missing, you don't stop. You find a solution and complete the task with excellence.

Availability & Commitment: Starting with a part-time collaboration (20h/week) with a clear intention of moving to Full-Time shortly. We work 5 days a week, but availability on Saturdays and Sundays is required for emergencies. Please note: we are looking for a dedicated partner, not an "Upwork or Fiverr style" freelancer juggling 5-6 different companies. If you cannot guarantee us top priority and absolute mental focus, do not apply.

Obsessive Precision & Anti-Mediocrity: Subtitles, cuts, and details must be perfect. Mediocrity is not allowed in our team.

Fluent in English: The team communicates in English. Deep proficiency is mandatory to manage multilingual content (IT, FR, ES, DE, NL).

What We Offer:

Performance Bonuses: Potential for bonuses up to $1000+ per month based on the results of the videos produced.

Career Growth: A real opportunity to become Head of Video Editing.

Active Involvement: You will actively participate in the growth of an international company, testing the most powerful AI tools on the market.

description:

Full-time · Remote · $6.25/hour starting

MoesGroup is a California-based skincare manufacturer. We run our own DTC skincare brands and handle brand management for select client brands. We're small, fast-moving, and building out our core team right now — this is the first senior hire in this function, so you'll have real ownership from day one.

You'll own social media and online reputation across our portfolio of brands. Day-to-day that means running the content calendars, creating the assets (graphics + short-form video), writing the copy, managing the inboxes, and keeping an eye on how people talk about our brands online. This is a hands-on role to start — you're the one doing the work — but as you learn the business, you'll build and manage a team under you.

title: Engineering Manager (Delivery & Execution)
description:
We are seeking an Engineering manager who can own predictable delivery across engineering by enforcing sprint discipline, decision clarity, and execution standards. Reduce coordination cost, eliminate rework, and ensure that engineering output is reviewable, shippable, and on time.



Core Responsibilities



Sprint Ownership & Delivery Control

• Own sprint planning, execution, and closure

• Enforce sprint scope boundaries (no silent mid-sprint additions)

• Ensure all tickets entering a sprint meet Definition of Ready

• Track and act on: ticket aging, spillover, churn, blocked work

• Move tickets aggressively across states (TODO ? IN PROGRESS ? REVIEW ? DONE)

• Kill zombie tickets



Timebox Enforcement

• Treat timeboxes as coordination contracts, not estimates

• Require proactive communication before a timebox slips

• Block review if timebox standards are violated

• Escalate early, not after the fact



Execution Quality Gates

• Enforce: Definition of Ready (before sprint), Definition of Done (before release)

• Reject work that: contains implicit decisions, lacks acceptance criteria, introduces duplication without approval

• Ensure code review happens before QA

• Ensure QA does not compensate for missing engineering clarity



Decision Discipline (in partnership with TPM / Product)

• Require explicit tracking of: Open Decisions, Frozen Decisions

• Block execution on unresolved architectural decisions

• Ensure decisions are made by the right group, at the right time

• Prevent “decision by implementation”



5. Engineering Standards Enforcement

• Enforce agreed standards consistently: no duplication without approval, no implicit architecture decisions, no skipping ticket states

• Treat violations as delivery risk, not personal issues

• Track repeat violations and escalate



Required Skills & Traits



Must Have

• Strong judgment around delivery tradeoffs

• Comfort enforcing rules and saying “no”

• Ability to stop work and force alignment

• Low tolerance for ambiguity in execution

• Bias for early escalation over late heroics

• Calm under pressure, emotionally neutral

• Experience running sprints that actually ship

• Strong English language skills

• Familiarity with Jira-style workflows



Nice to Have

• Background as senior engineer

• Experience in SaaS / platform teams

• Worked alongside TPMs or Product Managers

title: Product Manager (Technical) / Software Architect
description:
We are seeking a Technical Product Manager / Architect who bridges product design and engineering execution. This role combines system-level thinking, architectural oversight, and clear, actionable documentation—producing deliverables engineers can build from directly. The ideal candidate can translate business needs into architecture diagrams, wireframes, and well-scoped tickets with code-level precision, ensuring efficient handoff and reduced rework.



Requirements & Documentation

• Author architecture-aware product specifications including system diagrams, logic flows, and key technical dependencies.

• Prepare engineer-ready tickets, including pseudocode, scaffolding, or sample API structures.

• Conduct architecture and code reviews, identifying potential design or implementation issues early.

• Build wireframes, mockups, and interaction flows using Figma or equivalent tools to align engineering and UX/UI early in the cycle.

• Collaborate with engineering to ensure technical feasibility and architectural scalability before feature commitment.

Cross-Functional Execution

• Work closely with engineering leads to break down architecture into structured deliverables and sprint-ready tasks.

• Lead technical review sessions to validate assumptions and architecture decisions before coding begins.



Qualifications

• Strong understanding of software architecture principles, REST APIs, and modular system design.

• Hands-on experience writing or reviewing code in PHP, JavaScript, and SQL preferred.

• Proficiency in creating wireframes, prototypes, and UI flows that accurately reflect data and system constraints.

• Ability to evaluate trade-offs between architectural purity, delivery speed, and scalability.

• Prior experience functioning as a bridge between engineering and design, ensuring clarity and readiness for execution.

title: Part-Time Executive Assistant and Operations VA
description:
Part-Time Executive Assistant / Operations VA for Physician Entrepreneur & Telehealth Medical Spa



About the Role



I am a physician entrepreneur seeking a highly organized, proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support several interconnected businesses, including:



- A telehealth-focused medical spa

- Physician consulting and coaching businesses

- A podcast and media platform

- Professional speaking and educational initiatives



This is a long-term, part-time contractor role ideal for someone who is reliable, tech-savvy, professional, and comfortable working within structured systems and SOPs.



This is NOT a “creative influencer manager” role.

This is an execution and operations support role.



---



Estimated Hours



- Initially: 5–10 hours/week

- Potential to expand over time based on performance and business growth



---



Responsibilities



Administrative & Operations Support



- Monitor and organize business inboxes

- Respond to basic client/customer inquiries using templates and SOPs

- Track and follow up on leads and appointments

- Assist with appointment coordination and confirmations

- Monitor missed calls and inbound inquiries

- Help maintain spreadsheets, trackers, and CRM systems

- Organize files and documents in Google Drive

- Assist with intake workflows and basic operational tasks

- Escalate urgent issues appropriately



Podcast & Business Support



- Coordinate guest communication and scheduling

- Help maintain content calendars and workflow tracking

- Support administrative aspects of podcast and coaching operations



Technology & Systems



Experience with or willingness to learn:



- Google Workspace

- Gmail

- Google Drive

- Slack

- Calendly/Acuity Scheduling

- CRM systems

- AI-assisted workflows

- Social media scheduling tools



Experience with medical practice systems or telehealth workflows is a plus.



---



Preferred Qualifications



- Prior experience as a Virtual Assistant or Executive Assistant

- Strong written English communication skills

- Extremely organized and detail-oriented

- Able to follow SOPs and workflows carefully

- Comfortable working independently

- Professional and reliable communication

- Experience supporting healthcare, telehealth, medical, wellness, or coaching businesses is preferred

- HIPAA awareness or healthcare admin experience is a plus



---



Important Notes



- This role requires professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality

- Clear communication and accountability are extremely important

- Detailed task tracking and time tracking will be required

- Most workflows are already systematized and automation-assisted

- This role is intended to support operations and execution — not to independently direct strategy



---



Compensation



Please include:



- Your hourly rate

- Your availability and time zone

- Your experience with healthcare or telehealth businesses

- Examples of similar roles you’ve supported



---



To Apply



Please send:



1. A brief introduction about yourself

2. Your resume or portfolio

3. Your relevant experience

4. Your hourly rate

5. A short explanation of why you’d be a good fit for this role



Applications with clear communication and attention to detail will be prioritized.

title: Accounting Clerk / Bookkeeper – QuickBooks, AP/AR, Invoicing & Data Entry
description:
We are hiring a full-time remote Accounting Clerk / Bookkeeper / Accounting Assistant to join our growing back-office accounting team. This is a long-term role for a detail-oriented accounting professional with strong QuickBooks Desktop / QuickBooks Enterprise experience who enjoys hands-on bookkeeping, data entry, and Accounts Payable / Accounts Receivable work.



You will perform daily data entry into our financial ERP systems (Fishbowl Inventory Advanced, QuickBooks Enterprise, and Asana), audit transactions for accuracy, process AP and AR transactions, and handle other day-to-day administrative accounting and back-office support functions.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES



- Post cash receipts and record daily financial transactions.

- Invoice customers and follow up on outstanding balances to collect payments.

- Enter customer purchase orders into our ERP / financial systems.

- Process Accounts Receivable transactions, including customer credit card, ACH, and wire transfer payments.

- Review vendor bills and purchase orders for accuracy and proper coding.

- Assist with bank reconciliations and general ledger account reconciliations.

- Provide administrative backup and support to the sales team as needed.

- Perform other bookkeeping, accounting, financial, and administrative tasks as required.



REQUIREMENTS



- College degree in Accountancy, Accounting, Finance, or equivalent.

- Prior experience in an accounting department, bookkeeping role, or other financial/back-office position.

- 3+ years of advanced, hands-on experience with QuickBooks Desktop / QuickBooks Enterprise.

- Strong skills handling financial and numeric data with a high degree of accuracy.

- Proficient in Microsoft Excel, including VLOOKUP and Pivot Tables.

- Ability to maintain strict confidentiality when handling sensitive financial information.

- Highly organized, persistent, and detail-oriented.

- Strong critical thinking, multitasking, prioritization, and time management skills.

- Excellent written and spoken English for clear communication with our US-based team.

- Reliable computer, stable high-speed internet, and a quiet home-office setup.



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with Fishbowl Inventory or other inventory/ERP systems.

- Experience using Asana or similar project management tools.

- Background supporting a US-based company, e-commerce business, or consumer products manufacturer.



ABOUT US



Accessory Power is a US-based consumer electronics manufacturer that has been providing high-quality products for over 30 years. We design, manufacture, and market thousands of products under our four main brands — GOgroove, ENHANCE, ReVIVE, and USA Gear — along with several other product lines and accessory categories. We are growing quickly and need your help to keep our accounting operations running smoothly.



Learn more about our company at: 
/about



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

1. A short introduction about yourself and your accounting background.

2. Your years of experience with QuickBooks Desktop / Enterprise and any other ERP systems you have used.

3. Your expected monthly salary (in USD or PHP).

4. Your available start date and number of hours per week you can commit.

5. An updated résumé or CV.



We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: DTC E-commerce Video Editor for Facebook/Instagram Ads (AI Tools Required)
description:
Job Type: Contract / Ongoing

Experience Level: Expert

Project Length: 3-6 months with potential for long-term

About Us

We're a fast-growing DTC e-commerce brand scaling our paid social efforts on
 and Instagram. We're looking for a creative, data-driven video editor who lives and breathes performance creative and can produce high-converting ads at volume.

What You'll Be Doing

You'll be editing 15-25 short-form video ads per week (6s, 15s, 30s formats) for our Meta campaigns. This includes UGC-style ads, static-to-video conversions, testimonial edits, product showcases, and fully AI-generated concepts. You'll work closely with our media buyer to iterate on winning creatives, test new hooks, and scale proven concepts into fresh variations.

Must-Have Requirements

You need to have a proven track record editing DTC video ads that have actually run on
 and Instagram — not just general video editing experience. We want to see work that drove results, not just looked pretty. Specifically, we're looking for someone who:



Has at least 2+ years of hands-on experience creating performance video ads for DTC e-commerce brands

Is fluent in AI video generation tools, specifically Kling and Veo (please mention which versions you've used)

Knows how to use AI tools like Runway, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, and similar for b-roll generation, voiceovers, and visual effects

Understands Meta ad creative best practices: hook rates, thumb-stop ratios, aspect ratios (9:16, 4:5, 1:1), captions, pattern interrupts, and CTA placement

Is proficient in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or CapCut Pro

Can turn around first drafts within 24-48 hours and handle revisions quickly

Has a portfolio of
/Instagram ads you've edited (please share links or a reel)



Nice to Have



Experience with TikTok ads or YouTube Shorts

Copywriting skills for hooks and on-screen text

Experience scripting AI video prompts that produce cinematic, brand-safe outputs

Familiarity with tools like Arcads, HeyGen, or Creatify for AI UGC



To Apply

Please include the following in your proposal (applications without these will be ignored):



A portfolio or reel of DTC video ads you've edited that ran on Meta

2-3 specific examples of ads where you used Kling or Veo — ideally with a brief note on the prompt/approach

Your typical turnaround time for a 15-second ad

Your rate (hourly or per-ad pricing)

Start your proposal with the word "SCROLL-STOPPER" so we know you read the full post

title: SEO / AEO Specialist (Multi-Client Execution & Page Building)
description:
We are looking for an experienced SEO specialist who can handle execution and light strategy across multiple client websites.



This role goes beyond basic SEO tasks. You will be responsible for building, structuring, and optimizing pages across 5–6 client sites per month. We will provide direction and content where needed, but you should be comfortable working independently and filling in gaps.



Responsibilities include:



Building service pages and location pages from scratch

Structuring content for both search engines and AI-driven results (AEO)

Optimizing headers, page layout, and internal linking

Implementing content in WordPress and other CMS platforms

Managing multiple client websites at once

Ensuring consistency and quality across all sites



You should be comfortable:



Taking ownership of projects

Working across multiple industries

Making judgment calls when needed (not just following instructions)



Ideal Candidate:



3+ years SEO experience (local SEO preferred)

Strong experience with service/location page builds

Comfortable managing multiple websites at once

Detail-oriented and fast with execution

Understands modern SEO (not just backlinks and blogs)



Important:

We are not looking for a content writer or a beginner. This is an execution-focused role with real responsibility.

title: Personal/Executive Assistant
description:
Please complete the onlinejobs.ph English test before applying.



# Executive Assistant (Full-Time)



We're a small US-based small business startup looking for an Executive Assistant to support the founder directly.



You'll manage his calendar, make phone calls, handle
, coordinate with vendors and service providers, and take care of administrative tasks. You'll be on voice or chat throughout the workday and expected to act on requests quickly.

title: Recruiter / Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
Recruiter / Talent Acquisition Specialist (Remote)



Mission of the Role

To build and manage a scalable hiring system for AceHOM Group—sourcing, screening, and placing high-quality talent across all roles (Sales, VAs, Marketing, Tech, etc.).

Your goal is to ensure every hire is high-quality, well-vetted, aligned, and set up for success.

You are responsible for creating a consistent pipeline of A-players.



Key Responsibilities

* Source candidates across platforms (Indeed, LinkedIn, Upwork, OnlineJobs, etc.)

* Build and maintain a strong candidate pipeline

* Create and optimize job postings

* Screen resumes and conduct initial interviews

* Assess candidates based on skills, communication, and culture fit

* Coordinate interviews and manage hiring stages

* Assign and evaluate test tasks using scorecards

* Present top candidates and assist with offers

* Support onboarding and ensure smooth hiring transitions

* Track hiring metrics and continuously improve processes



Requirements

* Proven experience recruiting for remote, sales, or VA roles

* Strong interviewing, screening, and evaluation skills

* Excellent English communication (spoken + written)

* Ability to identify high performers vs average candidates

* Highly organized and able to manage multiple roles

* Proactive, reliable, and results-driven



Preferred

* Experience recruiting for real estate or sales roles

* Familiar with ATS/CRM systems

* Experience with global/remote hiring

* Understanding of performance-based hiring



KPIs

* Time to hire

* Quality of hire & retention (30/60/90 days)

* Pipeline strength

* Interview-to-hire conversion rate

* Hiring efficiency



What We Offer

* Remote position

* Direct client

* Growth into leadership (Head of People)

* High-impact role in a scaling company

* Performance-based growth and compensation



Compensation

- $2-$4 (depending on experience)



Expectations:

* Bring in 2–5 qualified candidates per week

* Manage candidates through the full hiring pipeline

* Focus on quality over quantity (we hire producers, not seat-fillers)

Base pay may be offered after 30–90 days based on performance.



Schedule

Part-time to start ? Full-time within 30–60 days?Must overlap with U.S. business hours



Ideal Candidate

* Strong judge of character

* Organized and detail-oriented

* Fast, proactive, and accountable

* Excellent communicator

* Focused on long-term team building



Apply Here:

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer (High-CTR Focus)
description:
Overview

We’re looking for a skilled YouTube Thumbnail Designer who understands one thing above all else: getting clicks.



This is not a “make it look nice” design role.

This is a performance role.



Your job is to create thumbnails that increase CTR and drive views. If you don’t understand YouTube psychology, this is not for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

Designing high-converting YouTube thumbnails across multiple niches

Turning video concepts into clear, clickable visual ideas

Following proven thumbnail structures (emotion, contrast, curiosity, clarity)

Iterating fast based on feedback and performance

Matching styles across different brands using design profiles

Delivering revisions quickly (same-day when needed)



You will often be given:



A video title or concept

Reference thumbnails

Basic direction



Your job is to make it better.



What We’re Looking For

Strong Photoshop skills (non-negotiable)

Proven experience designing YouTube thumbnails

Understanding of:

CTR (click-through rate)

Visual hierarchy

Facial expressions and emotion

Color contrast and readability

Ability to replicate and adapt styles across channels

Fast turnaround (24 hours or less preferred)

Good communication and reliability



Bonus if you:



Have worked with creators or agencies

Understand YouTube trends and packaging

Can think strategically, not just execute



What This Is NOT

Not graphic design for logos, flyers, or social posts

Not slow, perfectionist work that takes days

Not “art-first” design — performance comes first



Work Structure

Ongoing work (not one-off)

Multiple thumbnails per week

Clear feedback and systems in place

Long-term opportunity for the right person



We run a structured workflow with assigned tasks, deadlines, and performance tracking.



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, you must include:



Portfolio (required)

Show your BEST thumbnails only (not 20 average ones)

Before/After Examples (if available)

Show thumbnails that improved performance

Your Process

Briefly explain how you approach a new thumbnail

Answer This:

What makes someone click a thumbnail?



If you don’t follow these steps, your application will be ignored.



Compensation is a flat rate per design

Based on experience and skill level

Opportunity for performance-based bonuses

Long-term growth potential for top performers



Final Note



We don’t need average designers.



We’re looking for someone who understands that thumbnails are one of the most important growth levers on YouTube and treats them that way.



If that’s you, apply.

title: Clay Specialist for B2B Enrichment Project
description:
WHAT I NEED DONE

I need a Clay specialist to run a one-time enrichment pass on a CSV of approximately 5,000 US & Canadian business contacts  in the medical aesthetics and med spa industry. 

The workflow in Clay:



For each contact, scrape their company website (homepage, about, services pages)

Scrape their 
pany Page

Use an AI classification column (GPT-4 or Claude) to confirm whether the business is a medical aesthetic clinic — medspa, plastic surgery, cosmetic dermatology, laser clinic, injectable clinic, body contouring — or not

Fill in missing City / State / Country fields from the scraped data

Tag confidence level (High / Medium / Low) based on evidence strength

Export clean CSV



Quality gate: Run first 50 rows as a sample, send to me for approval, then batch the remaining ~4,500.

I will provide the input CSV, target columns, and the exact classification prompt. You build and run the Clay table.



MUST-HAVE SKILLS




 proficiency — not as a listed skill, but as a core tool you use weekly. You know how to chain enrichments, write AI prompt columns, manage credit burn, and avoid common failures (rate limits, blocked scrapes, bad retries).


 familiarity — the source data is an Apollo export; you'll recognize the column layout.

LinkedIn scraping experience within Clay (
pany Page scraper or equivalent enrichment source).

English reading comprehension — strong enough to judge whether a business description describes an aesthetic clinic vs. a general medical practice.

CSV handling — Google Sheets, Excel, or similar.





NICE-TO-HAVE



Prior experience enriching B2B lists in healthcare, medical, aesthetics, or medspa verticals

Apollo + Clay + Instantly / Smartlead workflow experience

Phantombuster, Apify, or other scraping alternatives you can fall back on when Clay can't reach a source

Experience writing AI classification prompts that return consistent, structured outputs





HOW TO APPLY

Send a reply that includes all four of the following. Applications missing any of these will be skipped.



A screenshot of a Clay table from a real B2B enrichment project you've run. (If NDA, blur the data — I just need to see your column structure and enrichment chain.)

Your best estimate of Clay credits required for 5000 rows × 3 enrichments (website scrape + LinkedIn scrape + AI classification). This tells me you understand credit economics.

Your hourly rate in USD and total hours you estimate for the full project.

One sentence on how you'd handle a row where the website is down or the LinkedIn is private — what's your fallback?





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



1,500 rows processed and returned as a clean CSV

Every row tagged Yes/No on "is this an aesthetic clinic"

Every Yes row has geography filled

Confidence column lets me spot-check low-confidence rows

Delivered within 10 days

Total labor cost stays within agreed budget





WHO I AM

I'm the founder of Coastal AI, a consultancy helping medical aesthetic clinics implement AI and marketing systems. This enrichment job is the first step in cleaning up our outbound prospect list so we can stop
ing non-ICP companies. If this project goes well, I'll have future enrichment projects as we grow the list.

Not interested in: full-time hires, monthly retainers, VAs who list Clay as one skill among 40, or applicants who skip the four questions above.

Looking forward to reading your application.

— Michelle

Coastal AI

title: VA - Podcast Research Assistant
description:
Podcast Research Assistant — $3 per hr,  8 hrs/day

We're hiring a researcher to find podcasts from our spreedsheet list.

The work: 400 searches per day. Most take 30 seconds, some up to a minute. You'll be sorting podcasts into tiers based on production quality:

Tier 1: Strong camera quality, solid audio, multiple camera angles

Tier 2: Zoom-style podcasts

Tier 3: Single-camera in-person podcasts

Marking Unknown 

Deleting clear audio only or NOT a podcast.

What you get:

Brief but detailed training before you start

A color-code legend to tag each podcast

~4 hours of actual work per day

No time tracking. We don't care when you work or what hours you keep

Pay is based on searches completed each day. Not hours logged

Rate: $3/hour, 8-hour day equivalent paid weekly. 

You're a fit: you can work independently, follow a clear rubric, and move fast without sacrificing accuracy.

title: Video Editor  (High-Level | Ads + Long-Form Content)
description:

Rate: $6–9/hour (based on experience)

To apply, fill out the following form:

title: Video Editor
description:
About the Role

Body Restore is the #1 shower steamer on Amazon with 60,000+ reviews. We are scaling paid media across Meta, Amazon DSP, and Streaming TV to grow our direct-to-consumer channel. We are looking for a dedicated performance creative editor who can produce high-volume ad variations that drive conversions across platforms and placements.

Responsibilities

• Edit  5-10+ ad variations per week across Meta placements (Reels, Stories, Feed) in 9:16, 4:5, and 1:1 formats

• Produce 16:9 video ads for Amazon Sponsored Brands Video, Amazon DSP, and Streaming TV (OTT/CTV) placements

• Cut and repackage raw UGC creator footage into performance-optimized ads with captions, text overlays, and motion graphics

• Build modular ad structures: swap hooks, bodies, and CTAs to create rapid A/B test variations from existing assets

• Produce core ad formats including UGC testimonials, problem-to-solution narratives, comparison ads, unboxing and reveal content, and mashup compilations

• Collaborate on weekly creative testing plans and proactively identify creative fatigue for refresh

• Maintain an organized asset library of raw footage, b-roll, product shots, UGC clips, music, and sound effects

Requirements

• 3+ years editing short-form video ads for DTC or e-commerce brands running paid social or Amazon ads

• Proficient in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or CapCut Pro with emphasis on speed and volume

• Portfolio of direct-response performance ads — not brand or lifestyle content

• Strong understanding of ad structure: hook (first 3 seconds), hold rate, value proposition, social proof, and CTA

• Experience producing both vertical (9:16) and landscape (16:9) ad formats for Meta and Amazon

• Self-directed with 24–48 hour turnaround on standard edits and same-day availability for urgent iterations

• Strong English communication skills

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with Amazon Sponsored Brands Video, Amazon DSP, or Streaming TV ad specs and delivery requirements

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager and Amazon campaign metrics (hook rate, CTR, DPVR) and how they inform creative decisions

• Motion graphics and After Effects skills for product animations, ingredient callouts, and dynamic end cards

• TikTok Shop or TikTok ads creative experience

• Background in wellness, personal care, or CPG categories

title: HIRING ASAP! Google Media Buyer (eCommerce)
description:
Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.



GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where great ideas don’t sit in slides — they turn into real, measurable growth. We build and scale online brands across international markets, and our tea
mbers take real ownership, grow fast, and help shape the future of the company.



We’re now looking for a performance-driven Google Ads Media Buyer to help take our main revenue channel to the next level.



Why This Role Matters

Google Ads drives around 90% of our total company revenue. That means your work won’t just “support marketing”, it will directly influence the growth of the entire business.



This role is perfect for someone who loves improving systems, scaling performance, and turning data into smarter decisions. You won’t just manage campaigns, you’ll help evolve the way we run Google Ads.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

From day one, you’ll have real ownership. Within your first 90 days, success in this role will mean:

- Developing and rolling out a new or significantly improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping campaigns for stronger scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements, targeting a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Using performance data to continuously refine bidding strategies, campaign structure, and product feed performance



Your goal is simple: turn ad spend into scalable, profitable growth.



We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 3 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing or media buying

- Has direct experience running Google Shopping campaigns for large eCommerce catalogs (10,000+ products)

- Has managed high-budget ad accounts ($300K+ per month)

- Is highly proficient in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically and uses data to drive decisions, not guesswork

- Enjoys testing, optimizing, and uncovering performance opportunities others might miss

- Is comfortable taking full ownership of results and being accountable for revenue impact



Hiring Process

As part of our process, shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads knowledge assessment. This helps us understand your hands-on expertise before moving forward to the HR interview stage.





Ready to Grow With Us?

If you’re looking for a role where your work matters, your growth is supported, and your impact is visible — we’d love to hear from you.

You’ll help elevate our campaign structure, strategy, and overall account performance, ensuring our ad spend translates into scalable and profitable growth.

description:

Job Posting:

About the Role

We are a growing insurance agency specializing in car insurance, home insurance, and other personal lines Property & Casualty (P&C) coverage. We're looking for an experienced Virtual Assistant with strong expertise in insurance marketing to help us generate leads, nurture prospects, support client retention, and drive consistent growth.

 newsletters, Google ads, and landing pages focused on car and home insurance

title: SOCIAL MEDIA OPERATOR / CONTENT CREATOR (TRUCKING – B2B)
description:
About the Role

Fleetmule is a fast-growing startup helping small and mid-sized trucking carriers stay compliant with FMCSA and DOT regulations—without requiring a full-time compliance team. Backed by IT Park Ventures and international investors, we are building a product already gaining traction in the U.S. trucking market.

We are seeking a results-driven Social Media Marketing Specialist to lead and scale our digital presence. This role is ideal for someone who can take ownership of social media strategy, execute high-impact content, and drive measurable growth across platforms.



This is NOT a “post pretty graphics on Instagram” job.



We are looking for someone who can:

???? Get on camera

???? Break down complex trucking/compliance topics

???? Capture attention in the first 3 seconds

???? Turn content into inbound leads



If you are not comfortable speaking on camera or thinking like a marketer — do not apply.



Key Responsibilities

Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with business goals

Create, manage, and optimize content across LinkedIn, X 
), Instagram, and TikTok, targeting trucking owner-operators, fleet managers, and dispatchers

Research industry trends in trucking, logistics, and DOT compliance to produce timely and relevant content

Write clear, engaging, and conversion-focused captions, threads, and carousel copy that simplify complex topics

Design high-quality visual assets and short-form videos using tools such as Canva, CapCut, or similar platforms

Manage community engagement, including comments, messages, and mentions, while identifying potential leads and partnership opportunities

Track, analyze, and report on performance metrics (reach, engagement, growth), providing actionable insights and recommendations

Identify and execute collaborations with industry influencers, podcasts, and media outlets

Support product launches and marketing campaigns through coordinated social media initiatives



Requirements

Proven experience managing and growing social media accounts (preferably in B2B or startup environments)

Strong English writing and communication skills with a clear, concise, and audience-focused style

Proficiency in content creation tools (Canva, Adobe Express, CapCut, or similar)

Solid understanding of social media analytics and performance tracking

Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment

Strong interest in B2B, logistics, or transportation industries, with a willingness to quickly build domain knowledge



Nice to Have

Experience with paid social campaigns

Basic video editing and storytelling skills

Familiarity with SEO and content marketing principles

Experience collaborating with influencers or managing partnerships



DO NOT APPLY IF

You only scheduled posts or used templates

You never created content that performed (views don’t lie)

You are not comfortable on camera

You don’t understand how to grab attention FAST



BONUS 

Experience in trucking / logistics content

Understanding of U.S. compliance (FMCSA, DOT, etc.)

Experience growing accounts from 0 ? traction


 + trend awareness (without being cringe)

title: Insurance Claims Virtual Assistant (Xactimate / Symbility / JobNimbus)
description:
Overview



We are hiring a Virtual Assistant to support insurance claims management for a residential exterior restoration company (roofing, siding, windows, gutters, and storm damage).



This role is responsible for moving insurance claims from review to full payment through accurate data management, documentation, supplement support, and consistent follow up with insurance carriers. This is a process driven, execution focused role with clear workflows and expectations. 



* Only applicants with relevant claims or Xactimate experience will be considered.



Key Responsibilities



• Manage and update claims in JobNimbus (CRM)

• Maintain accurate claim data, notes, and communication logs

• Retrieve loss sheets, estimates, and payment breakdowns from carriers

• Organize and upload all claim documentation (photos, contracts, invoices, estimates)

• Review Xactimate and Symbility estimates and flag missing items or discrepancies

• Assist in preparing and submitting supplement packages

• Follow up with adjusters on approvals, status, and payments

• Track invoices, depreciation release, and outstanding balances

• Ensure all claims are updated daily and properly documented



Requirements (Mandatory)

• Experience using and updating a CRM system (JobNimbus preferred)

• Familiarity with Xactimate (must be able to read and understand estimates)

• Familiarity with Symbility

• Strong attention to detail and data accuracy

• Basic understanding of residential building codes

• Excellent written English

• Ability to follow structured workflows and meet daily activity expectations



Preferred

• Experience with JobNimbus

• Experience in roofing or exterior restoration

• Experience handling insurance claims and supplements



Working Hours (Required)

• Monday to Friday

• 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM EST (U.S. time)

• Must be consistently available during these hours



Application Instructions

To be considered, include the following in your application:



1. Your experience with Xactimate or Symbility

2. Your experience working with insurance claims

3. A brief description of a claim or project you have worked on

If you’ve never been responsible for keeping a carrier compliant — this is not for you.



ou will be responsible for keeping drivers and the company audit-ready at all times.



That means:



You understand what happens during a DOT audit

You know how to build and maintain clean DQ files

You don’t wait for problems — you prevent them



WHAT YOU MUST ALREADY KNOW (NO TRAINING PROVIDED):

Full DQ file structure (not just uploading docs — understanding compliance)

MVR + PSP review and risk evaluation

Drug & Alcohol Clearinghouse process

HOS / ELD violations and patterns

CDL, Med Card, and expiration tracking systems

How to identify red flags BEFORE they become violations



REAL WORK YOU WILL DO:

Reject drivers who are not compliant

Flag high-risk drivers before dispatch

Catch missing or fake documentation

Keep the company ready for inspection ANY DAY

Communicate with drivers and enforce compliance (not just request nicely)



DO NOT APPLY IF:

You only did data entry

You followed instructions without understanding compliance

You need training on basics

You never handled real violations or audit preparation



APPLY ONLY IF:

You have 2+ years REAL U.S. trucking safety/compliance experience

You have personally worked with FMCSA requirements

You can confidently say:

???? “I know what will fail a DOT audit”



WHAT WE OFFER:

Serious company with systems (not chaos)

AI-assisted workflow (less manual chasing)

Long-term role with growth into Safety Manager / Compliance Lead

Competitive pay for real professionals



TO APPLY:



Send:



Your experience (specific — not general)

What EXACT tasks you handled (DQ, audits, violations, etc.)

What systems you used

Describe ONE real compliance issue you caught or prevented



Start your message with: “NO SHORTCUTS”



Applications without this will be ignored.

title: TikTok Editor Needed for Short Cut-Down Work + Thumbnails (Recurring, 5 videos/week)
description:
Looking for a reliable TikTok editor for recurring, straightforward work. This is NOT heavy production, please read the scope carefully before applying.



About the channel:

UK-based TikTok account focused on Business Analyst career content. Talking-head format, direct to camera. I film in batches and need someone consistent to handle the back-end so I can focus on recording.

The work per video:

I send a single raw file, roughly 5 minutes long, containing multiple takes of me delivering the same script. You deliver:



A vertical 9:16 TikTok edit, 35 to 45 seconds final length

A thumbnail image for the video cover



What the edit involves:



Select the strongest take from the raw footage

Trim tight, no dead air, cut ums, false starts, and bad takes

Captions, clean and readable

Light zooms and cuts where they help retention



What it does NOT involve:



No sound effects

No music

No B-roll

No stock footage

No motion graphics

No colour grading

No complex transitions



Thumbnail brief:



Static image pulled from the video or provided separately

Short punchy text overlay (I'll provide the text)

Clear, readable on a small screen

Consistent style across videos once we lock a template



This is quick, repetitive work once you have the system down. I'd estimate 15 to 20 minutes per video including the thumbnail. That's why the rate is $5 per deliverable. Please don't apply if you're looking for full production rates, it's not the right gig.

Volume:

5 videos per batch, roughly weekly. Paid weekly via Upwork.

Turnaround:

48 hours from when I drop the raws in the shared Google Drive.

Workflow:

Google Drive folders (Raw, In Progress, For Review, Approved) plus WhatsApp or Slack for quick questions. Simple and async.

Trial:

First 3 videos at $5 each as a trial. If the edits land and the communication is good, we move to an ongoing weekly arrangement. I'm looking for someone I can work with for 12+ months, not a one-off.

To apply, please include:



2 to 3 examples of short-form vertical edits you've done, talking-head style ideal

1 example of a thumbnail you've designed (even if just for personal or practice work)

Describe your process for editing a talking-head TikTok from raw footage. What do you prioritise when choosing between takes? How do you d
 where to cut? 

Confirm 48 hour turnaround works for you

Your upload speed (rough Mbps is fine)

title: Family Law Paralegal
description:
The Family Law Paralegal will provide comprehensive litigation support in complex divorce, custody, child support, and post-decree matters. The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, and capable of managing sensitive cases with professionalism and discretion.



Key Responsibilities



Draft pleadings, motions, financial disclosures, and discovery requests/responses

Prepare and organize financial affidavits and supporting documentation

Manage case files from intake through trial and post-decree proceedings

Communicate with clients, opposing counsel, court staff, and third parties

Assist in trial preparation, including exhibit organization and witness coordination

Maintain calendaring of court deadlines and ensure compliance with procedural rules

Coordinate mediation, hearings, and depositions

Conduct legal research as needed

Maintain strict confidentiality and professionalism at all times



Qualifications



Minimum 2–3 years of family law paralegal experience (Colorado experience preferred)

Strong understanding of Colorado Rules of Civil Procedure and family law process

Experience handling high-asset and complex financial cases preferred

Proficiency in Microsoft Office and legal case management software

Exceptional written and verbal communication skills

Ability to manage multiple cases simultaneously

High level of discretion, professionalism, and client sensitivity

title: Business Development Representative
description:
Leapify is building the AI Operating System for Small & Midsize Businesses. We help service based businesses never miss a lead by automatically answering calls, texts, and follow ups using AI. We are not an agency and not a call center. We are a real product with real customers and we are growing fast.



We are looking for hungry and confident cold callers who are comfortable speaking with US based business owners all day and want to grow with a serious company.



What You Will Do

Make outbound cold calls to US based small business owners

Qualify leads and book demos for our sales team

Follow proven call scripts while sounding natural and conversational

Handle objections confidently and keep conversations moving forward

Log calls, notes, and outcomes accurately in our CRM

Show up every day ready to dial, learn, and improve



What We Are Looking For

Strong spoken English with a neutral or near neutral accent

Comfortable cold calling for multiple hours per day

Confident, competitive, and resilient. Rejection does not affect you

Sales or cold calling experience is a plus, but hunger and coachability matter more

Experience calling US businesses is a strong advantage

Reliable laptop, headset, and fast, stable internet connection

Self motivated and able to work without constant supervision



This Role Is Not For You If

You dislike cold calling

You need to be micromanaged

You are looking for a short term or side gig

You are uncomfortable speaking directly with business owners



Hiring Process

Background check required

Minimum of three professional references

Intro video required



How To Apply

Please submit a short intro video introducing yourself and your experience. Include a brief cold call pitch you would use after reviewing our website. Please also confirm that you have fast internet, proper equipment, and availability for full time dialing.



We are looking for people who want long term growth, not just a job.

title: Sales Manager
description:
Leapify is building the AI Operating System for Small & Midsize Businesses. We help service-based businesses capture, qualify, and convert leads automatically using AI. This is a real product with real customers. We are not an agency and not a call center.



We are building our outbound sales motion from the ground up and are looking for someone to own it end-to-end.



What You Will Do:

Lead and manage a team of cold callers and SDRs

Own daily, weekly, and monthly outbound performance metrics

Monitor call activity, conversations, meetings booked, and overall quality

Review call recordings and coach reps in real time

Run daily standups and weekly performance reviews

Enforce scripts, objection handling, tone, and dialing discipline

Work directly with the founder on messaging, training, and iteration

Identify top performers, coach the middle, and remove underperformers

Build consistency, accountability, and execution across the team



What We Are Looking For:

Proven outbound sales background. You have personally done cold calling

Experience managing SDRs or outbound reps. Teams of 5 to 15 preferred

Strong spoken English with the ability to coach tone, confidence, and pacing

Comfortable holding people accountable and having direct conversations

Process driven but practical. You know what works in the real world

Experience selling to US based SMBs is a strong plus

Startup mindset. You are comfortable building, testing, and adjusting quickly



This Role Is Not For You If:

You avoid confrontation or accountability

You have never carried a quota or made cold calls

You want a slow moving, corporate environment

You are looking for a light management role without pressure



Compensation:

Base salary: $1,500 to $2,000 USD per month

Performance bonus: $500 to $1,500+ USD per month

Bonuses tied to meetings booked, show rate, and closed revenue

Strong performers will grow quickly as the team scales



How To Apply - Send a short introduction including:

Your outbound sales and management experience

The size of teams you have managed

Your country and city

A short video introducing yourself is required

title: BPO Operations Manager
description:
WithPort is seeking a Recruitment Operations Manager to oversee workforce operations in the Philippines. This role is responsible for managing recruitment processes, employee administration, payroll coordination, and client staffing support to ensure smooth and efficient operations.



The successful candidate will serve as a key liaison between internal teams, employees, and clients, ensuring workforce delivery, compliance, and operational excellence.

Strong organizational and project coordination skills

Experience managing remote or distributed teams preferred

Familiarity with payroll coordination processes

Excellent written and verbal English communication

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities

description:

Categorize transactions and maintain clean books

Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

Prepare monthly financial reports including Profit and Loss, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow statements

Communicate with clients when clarification is needed

Maintain organized documentation and audit trails



Requirements:

3 plus years of bookkeeping experience

2 plus years of QuickBooks Online experience

Experience handling multiple clients simultaneously

Strong understanding of bank reconciliation, chart of accounts, accrual versus cash accounting, and financial reporting

Experience working with US-based clients

Excellent English communication skills

Highly organized and deadline-driven

Comfortable working independently



Preferred Qualifications:

Experience working in an accounting firm

Payroll processing experience

Cleanup and catch-up bookkeeping experience

Familiarity with Gusto, 
, Stripe, or similar tools



What We Are Looking For:

Takes ownership of work

Double-checks numbers before submission

Understands financial accuracy is critical

Can confidently explain reports to non-accounting clients

Comfortable managing 8 to 12 client accounts



Compensation:

Competitive monthly salary based on experience

Full-time remote position

Long-term opportunity with growth potential

Starting $400-$500 - can lead to $
+

• Wants a full-time role with massive salary growth opportunities



This position is for professionals only — no beginners, no part-timers, no hobby editors.







Salary & Growth



Starting Range: $400–500$1,500/month

• Travel opportunities and niche-specific projects available as you grow within the company



- To be part of a multinational team that cares about you, and be part of a team not just staff



We only hire people who want a full-time, long-term home — not freelancers jumping from project to project.







???? Your Responsibilities



4-8 videos Daily Video Editing & Production (duration anwher from 10secs to 2 mins+ )

• Edit in Adobe Premiere Pro (non-negotiable)



• Add creative transitions, pacing, captions, sound design, and storytelling



• Create viral-style videos without relying on generic templates



• Improve based on performance data & feedback



Marketing & Creative Strategy

• Work with the team to develop ideas, concepts, and hooks



• Help craft videos that sell, entertain, educate, or retain attention



• Understand how to market a physical product through content



• Be resourceful and solution-oriented with limited footage



• Create scenes using alternative footage, B-roll, and creative storytelling if clips are missing



Collaboration

• Work daily with our team (creators, assistants, strategists)

• Help turn raw ideas into powerful, viral-ready videos

• Bring your own suggestions, creativity, and marketing mind to every project







???? What Makes This Role Unique

• You will help grow a fast-scaling brand with huge global potential

• Long-term, stable, career-building opportunity

• You will have the freedom to grow, lead, and experiment creatively

• Exposure to different niches, products, and video styles

• Uploads of product footage will be provided, but creativity is required — when footage is missing, we adapt and find solutions

• Massive future salary growth for the right editor

• Opportunities to travel with the team as operations expand in couple of months from now



This is a job for someone who wants to build a real career, not just “edit videos.”







???? Ideal Candidate Profile

• Strong Adobe Premiere Pro skills

• Deep understanding of TikTok/Reels/Shorts virality

• Fast, efficient, and consistent daily editor

• Creative thinker with marketing instincts

• Problem solver who can work with limited footage

• Team player with great communication

• Long-term mindset with the ambition to grow inside the company

• Able to take feedback and improve quickly

• Full-time availability (no other jobs on the side)



?

3. Your expected salary range

4. Confirmation you can work full-time, long-term

5. Your availability and commitment level



?



???? Final Note



This is an exciting, high-growth opportunity for a dedicated editor who wants to rise, earn more, and build a powerful career inside a fast-growing company.

If you’re ready to work full-time, produce high-performing videos daily, and grow with a long-term team — we want to hear from you.

?

?

?



???? Ideal Candidate

 • Solid SEO knowledge (keyword research, on-page, technical basics)

 • Data-driven, analytical, and performance-obsessed

 • Comfortable working toward clear revenue targets

 • Proactive, solution-oriented, and detail-focused

 • Treats this role as a full-time career, not a side project

 • Hungry to earn more by delivering real, measurable results



?



???? What Makes This Opportunity Unique

 • Work with a fast-scaling international brand

 • Direct impact on revenue and growth

 • Performance-based pay with immediate upside

 • Long-term stability with strong infrastructure already in place

 • Freedom to implement what works — no micromanagement

 • Opportunity to become our go-to paid media & growth expert

 • A team that values results, ownership, and accountability



We already have strong foundations — now we want someone who can push performance to the next level.



?



? Deliverables

 • Monitor, analyse, and report PPC performance

 • Improve ROI and conversion efficiency

 • Conduct keyword research and analysis

 • Collaborate on ad copy, creatives, and landing page strategy



?



???? Final Note



This is not a maintenance role.

This is a growth role for someone who wants to scale revenue, be rewarded fairly, and build a long-term position inside a serious company.



NDA WILL NEED TO BE SIGNED BEFORE HIRE



If you’re a true PPC & SEO expert who wants to be paid based on results — not promises — we want to hear from you.



Only experienced, performance-driven applicants should apply.

nt.

title: Phone Support Specialist (WFH)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and confident communicator with strong English skills to handle client calls and support a growing U.S.-based business.

_____________________



ABOUT YOU: 

You are a capable, confident woman who takes pride in how you show up professionally: focused, reliable, and someone others can depend on.



You treat your work like it’s your own business.



You don’t just “answer calls.” You connect, influence, and move conversations forward.



You are sharp, quick-thinking, and confident speaking in English. You don’t rely on scripts to sound natural. You know how to build rapport with someone new.



You are not looking for your next job. You are looking for a long-term role where you can stay and become indispensable.

_____________________



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• You love speaking with people - the idea of confidently guiding clients, answering questions, and helping them move forward energizes you.

• You are calm, patient, and solution-focused under pressure - you don’t get flustered, you take control.

• You speak exceptional English with a clear voice and minimal accent - easily understood by U.S. callers.

• You can build rapport quickly - not robotic, not scripted, but natural and engaging.

• You are comfortable handling inbound sales inquiries and guiding warm leads toward clear next steps.

• You are resourceful and think on your feet - you don’t freeze when situations change.

• You are intelligent and proactive - you don’t wait to be told every step.

• You are comfortable influencing conversations - not aggressive sales, but confident guidance.

_____________________



READ THIS CAREFULLY

• If you do not naturally know how to build rapport with someone new, this position is NOT for you.

• If you prefer doing the minimum and logging off or clocking in/out, this position is NOT for you.

• If you are the type of woman who steps up, supports the business, and takes pride in doing excellent work — you will do very well here.

_____________________



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

• Work from home experience

• Night shift experience

• At least two years of work experience within the same company

• Executive assistant OR BPO experience

• Phone experience (ex: Phone customer support OR Phone sales experience)

_____________________



MINDSET REQUIREMENTS

• You take ownership - you treat the business like it’s yours

• You go the extra mile without being asked

• You are reliable, consistent, and professional every day

• You want long-term, possibly lifetime, stability - not job hopping every few years

_____________________



ABOUT US

• U.S.-based company

• Small and close like family

• We value long-term tea
mbers who want stability and consistency 

• We recognize your hard work and reward you for your dedication and additional contributions 

_____________________



COMMITMENT

• Independent Contractor work setup directly with the client.

• Full-time (40 working hours/week)

• Availability Requirement: Monday–Friday, within timeframe of 7 AM–7 PM Pacific Time. (Plus helping with time-sensitive client matters as needed Saturday-Sunday)

• Long-term, possibly lifetime position

• $500–$800/month (based on experience) + Bonuses

_____________________



FINAL NOTE

We are not looking for average. We are looking for a confident, capable woman who:

• Can communicate clearly

• Can connect with people and make them feel comfortable on the phone

• Can think independently

• Wants to stay and grow long-term



If that’s you - apply here: Apply Here:

OLJ Applications or OLJ Messages will not be reviewed.

Apply Here:

- Long-term role — we're looking for someone to grow with us, not a short project



**How to apply**

Start your application with the word "BANANA" so I know you read this carefully.



Then please include:

2. Your portfolio with live Shopify store URLs you've worked on (not screenshots)

3. How many years you've worked specifically with Shopify

4. One Shopify project you're most proud of and what your specific role was

5. Your expected monthly rate



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Data Analyst – Lead & Call Performance
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Remote Position

Location: Remote

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hrs/week)

Industry: Performance Marketing & Lead Generation

About Us

We are a performance marketing company that generates high-intent inbound leads and phone calls for businesses across the United States in industries such as home services and legal services.



Our company runs large-scale marketing campaigns across multiple channels and generates thousands of leads and calls every week. Because of this, our business is highly data-driven. Decisions about marketing budgets, campaign optimization, and partner performance are based heavily on analytics.



We are looking for a Data Analyst whose primary responsibility will be digging deeply into our lead and call data to uncover insights that improve performance and profitability.



This is not an administrative or bookkeeping position.

This role is focused on data investigation, analysis, and performance insights.



Core Responsibility: Deep Data Analysis

The primary responsibility of this role is analyzing large datasets related to lead generation and inbound call performance.

Your job is not simply compiling reports. Your job is to investigate the data, identify patterns, and explain what is happening and why.



Our systems generate large volumes of operational data every day. You will analyze this data to identify trends, detect anomalies, and uncover opportunities to improve performance.



Your work will directly influence how the company:

• Allocates marketing budgets

• Evaluates traffic sources and partners

• Identifies profitable campaigns

• Detects operational issues

• Improves overall lead quality and conversion performance



What “Digging Into the Data” Means

A large part of this role involves investigating performance changes and answering business questions using data.

Examples include:

• Why did lead volume drop in a specific campaign?

• Which traffic sources generate the highest quality calls?

• Which campaigns produce the highest revenue per lead?

• Why did conversion rates decline for a specific buyer?

• Which campaigns are producing the highest margins?

• Are there anomalies or irregular patterns in the data?



You will analyze raw data and translate it into clear explanations and insights for management.

Your role is to turn large amounts of operational data into meaningful business intelligence.



Types of Data You Will Work With

You will regularly analyze datasets that include:

• Lead generation performance data

• Call tracking and call duration data

• Campaign and traffic source performance

• Revenue and conversion data

• Buyer performance metrics

• Cost-per-lead and profitability metrics

• Operational performance reports



This data comes from multiple platforms and systems, and part of your role will be organizing and combining these datasets to produce meaningful analysis.



Key Responsibilities

Lead & Call Data Analysis

• Analyze large datasets related to lead generation and inbound calls

• Identify trends, patterns, and performance shifts

• Detect anomalies and investigate unusual data behavior

• Compare performance across campaigns, traffic sources, and buyers

• Evaluate profitability and performance metrics

• Provide insights to improve campaign efficiency and revenue



Reporting & Insights

• Create structured performance reports for leadership

• Build dashboards and analysis tools in Excel or Google Sheets

• Summarize trends and explain performance changes

• Present clear insights based on data findings



Data Investigation & Validation

• Investigate discrepancies between systems or reports

• Validate accuracy of lead and call reporting data

• Identify potential reporting issues or data inconsistencies

• Conduct deeper investigations when unusual performance changes occur



Requirements

We are specifically looking for someone with strong analytical ability and real experience working with data.

Required:

• 2+ years of experience in data analysis, marketing analytics, or operational analytics

• Strong ability to analyze large datasets

• Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills

• Strong understanding of trend analysis and data interpretation

• Strong attention to detail

• Strong written English communication skills

• Comfortable working with numbers and data every day



Strongly Preferred

• Experience analyzing marketing or lead generation data

• Experience analyzing call center or call tracking data

• Experience with SQL or database querying

• Experience using data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker, etc.)

• Experience working with performance marketing or lead generation companies



What We Offer

• Long-term stable position

• Competitive pay based on experience

• Performance-based raises

• Direct collaboration with company leadership

• Opportunity to grow into a Senior Data Analyst or Analytics Lead role



We are building a highly data-driven organization, and this role will play an important part in improving how we analyze and optimize performance.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

Your resume

A short paragraph describing your data analysis experience

A short paragraph describing the largest dataset you have worked with

The word “Insights” in the first line of your application (to confirm attention to detail)



If you enjoy digging into complex datasets, identifying patterns, and uncovering insights that improve business performance, we would love to hear from you.



We are hiring immediately.

title: Senior Bookkeeper (AU Clients Required | Xero | Public Practice Experience Essential)
description:
Senior Bookkeeper (AU Clients Required | Xero | Public Practice Experience Essential)



Salary: AUD $2,400–$2,700/month (full-time equivalent, depending on experience and capability)



We are a growing Australian accounting and bookkeeping firm looking for an experienced Senior Bookkeeper to join our team. This is a long-term, stable role, working directly with an Australian team, not a freelance or short-term position.



Important – Please Read Before Applying



This role requires:



• Experience working with Australian clients

• Experience in an accounting firm / public practice environment



Please do not apply if you do not meet these requirements.



Why This Role is Different



• Long-term, stable role (not project-based)

• Fully integrated with an Australian team

• Paid sick leave and annual leave

• Opportunity to grow into client-facing responsibilities

• Supportive, down-to-earth team environment



About the Role



You will manage a portfolio of approximately 20–30 clients (depending on complexity) across a mix of SME businesses. This is a hands-on role suited to someone who is comfortable managing multiple clients, working to deadlines, and taking ownership of their work.



Key Responsibilities



• Xero bookkeeping across multiple clients

• Bank and credit card reconciliations

• Accounts payable and receivable

• Payroll processing and reconciliations

• Month-end close

• Prepare BAS and complete GST reconciliation workpapers independently (for accountant review)

• Maintain clean, accurate financial records



Requirements (Essential)



• Public practice / accounting firm experience

• Experience with Australian clients

• Experience managing multiple clients (20+ preferred)

• Strong Xero experience

• Experience preparing BAS and GST reconciliations independently

• Australian payroll experience

• Experience with Hubdoc, Dext, or similar tools

• Strong spoken and written English (important)



About You



• You take ownership of your work

• You use common sense and initiative

• You’re comfortable in a growing firm (not overly structured)

• You’re not overly shy and enjoy team interaction

• You’re tech-savvy and interested in AI and the future of accounting

• You enjoy being part of a team with personality and banter



Working Setup



• Work aligned with Australian business hours (Perth time)

• Work directly with the director and small team

• Ideally full-time (38 hours), but open to reduced or school-hour-style arrangements for the right candidate



Work Setup Requirements



This is a fully remote role, and we expect a professional working environment.

You will need:

• A reliable computer/laptop capable of running remote desktop software efficiently

• A dual-screen setup (or willingness to set one up)

• Stable, high-speed internet

• A private and quiet workspace, free from distractions and background noise

This role involves working with sensitive financial information and requires a secure and professional setup at all times.



How to Apply (Important – Applications without this will be ignored)



Please include:

1. A short summary of your Australian client and public practice experience

2. The number of clients you have managed at one time

3. A brief overview of your current home office setup

4. A video introduction (2–4 minutes) answering:

• Your accounting firm experience

• Your Australian client experience

• How you reconcile a bank account in Xero

• How you prioritise multiple client deadlines

• Your month-end process

• A complex bookkeeping issue you’ve solved

(please provide a link to your video in your application)

4. Include the word “XERO-READY” at the top of your application



Applications without the above will not be considered.
